news.title: Neil Rimer 预测 AI 财富将面临再分配
news.summary: Index Ventures 联合创始人 Neil Rimer 在雅典的科技节上表示，围绕 AI 积累的财富将不可避免地面临某种形式的再分配，可能是自愿或强制。他呼吁科技领袖在自愿再分配中发挥主导作用。尽管美国慈善捐赠总额创新高，但捐赠人数却持续下降，加州正在考虑对亿万富翁征收 5% 的一次性财富税。
keyPoints: Neil Rimer 在 5 月底的科技节上表示，AI 领域的财富将面临再分配，可能是自愿或强制。
Rimer 是 Index Ventures 的联合创始人，该公司自成立以来已筹集约 150 亿美元的外部投资。
2024 年美国慈善捐赠总额达到 5925 亿美元，但实际捐赠人数连续五年下降，2024 年下降 4.5%。
加州计划对亿万富翁征收 5% 的一次性财富税，部分科技巨头已将居所迁至南佛罗里达以避税。
OpenAI 可能在 2027 年上市，若加州税法通过，将影响其全球资产的净值计算。
news.background: Neil Rimer 在雅典的科技节上发表了关于 AI 财富再分配的看法，强调科技领袖在这一过程中应发挥作用。自 2010 年以来，慈善捐赠的趋势发生了变化，尽管总额创新高，但参与捐赠的人数却在减少。根据《斯坦福社会创新评论》的数据，2000 年时有三分之二的家庭参与捐赠，而如今这一比例已降至约一半。加州的财富税提案引发了广泛讨论，许多亿万富翁已采取措施规避潜在的税收影响。
news.impact: Rimer 的观点可能会影响科技行业的慈善文化，促使更多企业领袖关注财富再分配问题。若加州的财富税通过，可能会导致更多亿万富翁迁移，进一步影响当地经济。与此同时，慈善捐赠的减少可能会促使政府采取更强硬的措施来实现财富再分配，甚至可能引发更广泛的社会讨论和政策变革。
useCases: 分析 AI 领域的财富分布，制定相应的商业策略。
参与慈善活动，提升企业社会责任形象。
研究财富再分配对社会经济的影响，制定政策建议。
risks: 财富再分配政策可能导致企业迁移，影响当地经济。
慈善捐赠的减少可能导致社会服务资金短缺。
亿万富翁税的实施可能引发法律挑战，增加政策不确定性。
news.reason: Neil Rimer 的观点揭示了 AI 经济中的财富再分配趋势，值得关注其对科技行业和社会的深远影响。
news.originalContent: In late May, Neil Rimer said something during a sit-down I had with him in Athens that I haven’t been able to shake. At a vibrant new tech festival in the city, talking about the wealth piling up around AI, he said he has “a strong sense that there will be some sort of a redistribution.” He continued on. “It’ll either be voluntary or it’ll be involuntary, but it’ll happen, and I hope it’s voluntary,” he told me, adding that he thinks tech leaders “can play a leading role in seeing that through.” Coming from most people, that would sound like standard-issue populism. Coming from Rimer, a co-founder of Index Ventures, one of the most successful venture firms of the last three decades, it seemed a striking thing to say in public. Rimer stepped back from day-to-day investing in 2021, and these days spends much of his time in Athens, where his wife is from and where his children treasure their Greek passports. He turned up to our interview in a rumpled button-down and jeans, not the quarter-zips and fine knitwear that mark so many of his peers. Yet Index’s returns in recent years have been exceptional: the firm has raised roughly $15 billion from outside investors since its founding, and last year’s exits including Figma’s IPO and Google’s purchase of the cybersecurity firm Wiz reportedly netted Index roughly $9 billion . Rimer has found ways to give back. He sits on the board of Endeavor Greece, which mentors entrepreneurs in emerging markets, and chaired the board of Human Rights Watch from 2019 to 2025. In late 2021, he and his father and two brothers gave $13 million to McGill University to renovate a campus building, now the Rimer Building, and found a new Institute for Indigenous Research and Knowledges. In the meantime, his comment about redistribution comes at an odd moment, to be charitable, for giving. The Giving Pledge, the promise Warren Buffett and Bill Gates launched in 2010 to get billionaires to commit half their fortunes to charity, is becoming increasingly irrelevant. One hundred and thirteen families signed in its first five years, then 72, then 43, then just four in all of 2024, per a New York Times report in March that underscored how out-of-fashion philanthropy has become among some of the richest people in tech. (Noted that piece: “Elon Musk, the world’s wealthiest person, has said that his businesses ‘ are philanthropy.’”) The pattern appears to hold beyond the Pledge. Total American charitable giving hit a record $592.5 billion in 2024, but the number of Americans actually giving has fallen for five straight years , down 4.5% in 2024 alone, according to the Stanford Social Innovation Review. Two-thirds of households donated in 2000; roughly half do now, and Bank of America and Lilly Family School data shows even affluent-household giving has slipped, from 90% in 2017 to 81% last year . The pattern shows up in Index’s own portfolio, too, which includes Anthropic . Business Insider recently asked a financial planner, Alex Caswell, whether his newly wealthy clients, many of them Anthropic employees tied to effective altruism, were pledging to give away the bulk of their fortunes. Anthropic matches employee donations of up to 25% of their equity to charity, and some of Caswell’s clients have used it, he told BI, but most weren’t building philanthropy into their plans at all; they were focused on angel investing or starting their own companies. “That’s what I’m seeing more than the desire to become philanthropic,” he told the outlet . Unsurprisingly, the absence of voluntary giving is now running up against attempts to legislate the outcome instead. California voters will decide this year on a 5% one-time wealth tax that targets the state’s billionaires. Some, including Google founders Sergey Brin and Larry Page, have already moved their primary residences to South Florida to be on the safe side. OpenAI is reportedly considering going public in 2027 , and cynically, one reason among others may be that the tax, if passed, will calculate net worth based on an individual’s worldwide assets as of the end of this calendar year. As unsurprisingly, there is plenty of opposition to any kind of wealth-redistribution measure of this scale, including by Governor Gavin Newsom, and including by economists who point out that many industrialized countries have repealed similar wealth taxes since 1990 after watching their wealthy residents skedaddle. Other options on the table are as controversial. OpenAI has reportedly discussed handing the federal government a 5% equity stake , an idea CEO Sam Altman has framed as sharing AI’s upside with the public, but critics see it instead as a way to buy political cover in Washington. In either case, Silicon Valley has never been eager to put Uncle Sam on the cap table. Joked veteran investor Roelof Bot

news.title: Apple 起诉 OpenAI，指控不当行为
news.summary: Apple 最近对 OpenAI 提起诉讼，指控其存在多项不当行为，尽管业内专家认为部分指控属于行业惯例。此举正值 Apple 发布新版软件公测版之际，外界普遍猜测 Apple 是因担忧 OpenAI 成为潜在竞争对手，还是希望在 OpenAI 处于弱势时获利。
keyPoints: Apple 于 2026 年 7 月 17 日对 OpenAI 提起诉讼，指控其存在多项不当行为。
业内专家普遍认为，部分指控属于行业惯例，反映出行业竞争的复杂性。
此次诉讼恰逢 Apple 发布新版软件公测版，Siri AI 成为核心亮点。
外界对 Apple 的动机产生猜测，认为其可能担忧 OpenAI 的竞争力。
Apple 以往有过多次引人注目的诉讼历史，显示出其在行业中的强硬立场。
news.background: Apple 与 OpenAI 的关系一直备受关注，尤其是在 AI 技术迅速发展的背景下。Apple 在 2026 年 7 月 17 日对 OpenAI 提起诉讼，指控其存在多项不当行为，尽管业内专家认为这些指控在某种程度上是行业内的普遍做法。此次诉讼的时机恰逢 Apple 发布新版软件公测版，Siri AI 成为其核心功能之一，可能暗示 Apple 对 OpenAI 的竞争力感到不安。过去，Apple 曾因竞争对手的崛起而采取法律行动，这次诉讼是否也是出于类似的考虑，值得关注。
news.impact: 此次诉讼可能对 AI 行业产生深远影响，尤其是在法律和道德层面。首先，Apple 的举动可能会促使其他公司在 AI 领域更加谨慎，避免类似的法律风险。其次，如果 Apple 成功，可能会改变行业内的竞争格局，迫使 OpenAI 及其他公司调整其商业策略。此外，消费者也可能受到影响，尤其是在 AI 产品和服务的选择上，可能会出现更多的法律和合规性问题。
useCases: 分析 Apple 与 OpenAI 之间的法律关系，评估潜在影响。
研究行业内的法律惯例，帮助公司规避法律风险。
关注 AI 领域的竞争动态，制定相应的商业策略。
risks: 诉讼可能导致 OpenAI 的商业模式受到影响，进而影响其市场表现。
法律费用和潜在的赔偿可能对 OpenAI 的财务状况造成压力。
行业内的法律不确定性可能导致投资者对 AI 公司的信心下降。
news.reason: 此事件揭示了科技巨头之间的竞争与法律博弈，值得深入分析。
news.originalContent: Podcasts AI Tech Apple’s plot to crush OpenAI Also on The Vergecast: Siri AI is here, OnePlus is leaving, and the cracking face emoji is coming. Also on The Vergecast: Siri AI is here, OnePlus is leaving, and the cracking face emoji is coming. by David Pierce Jul 17, 2026, 5:41 PM UTC David Pierce is editor-at-large and Vergecast co-host with over a decade of experience covering consumer tech. Previously, at Protocol, The Wall Street Journal, and Wired. Apple is suing OpenAI . The complaint is readable and intense, as these things often are, though many experts seem to think many of the allegations are just the ways things are done . So what does Apple really want here, and why is it picking such a public fight with OpenAI? On this episode of The Vergecast , Nilay and David go through the lawsuit, and look at Apple’s history of splashy litigation to determine whether Apple is worried about a possible competitor or simply looking to capitalize on a weak moment for OpenAI . All this is happening as Apple ships the public betas of its new software, headlined by the new Siri AI , and we have thoughts about what it all means — and whether the new Siri is actually any good. After all that, the hosts turn to the week’s gadget news, which includes leaks about OpenAI gadgets and Pixel phones , and OnePlus bailing on the US and Europe . The Samsung-Apple duopoly continues to rule in the US, and it looks increasingly hard for anyone to challenge . Unless you just go and buy T-Mobile. Finally, in the lightning round, we catch up on Brendan Carr , the latest chaos in your X feed , the cracking face emoji , the foothills of the singularity , and more. Watch | Listen | Get ad-free In case you missed it this week: We also ranked AI gadgets , listened to AI music , debated our review of the Steam Machine , and learned about AI detectors . And we want to hear all your thoughts about all of it! Call the Vergecast Hotline at 866-VERGE11, send us an email at vergecast@theverge.com, and tell us everything that’s on your mind. And make sure you subscribe so you don’t miss an episode! Follow topics and authors from this story to see more like this in your personalized homepage feed and to receive email updates. news.title: Grok 4.3 在 Amazon Bedrock 上的应用与接入
news.summary: Grok 4.3 是 xAI 在 Amazon Bedrock 上推出的强大 AI 模型，适合企业级工作负载。它支持文本和图像输入，具备可配置的推理能力，能够高效处理长文档和多轮对话。本文将介绍如何接入和使用 Grok 4.3 的基本功能。
keyPoints: Grok 4.3 在推理准确性方面表现优异，超越多项行业基准，适合企业级应用。
该模型支持文本和图像输入，具有 100 万个 token 的上下文窗口，适合处理长文档。
Grok 4.3 的推理努力级别可配置，用户可根据需求选择低、中、高等不同级别。
通过 Mantle 引擎接入 Grok 4.3，支持 OpenAI 兼容的 API 调用。
使用 IAM 凭证生成短期访问令牌，确保安全性和有效性。
news.background: Grok 4.3 是 xAI 最新推出的 AI 模型，专为企业级工作设计，强调推理的准确性和高效性。该模型在多个行业基准测试中表现出色，尤其是在客户支持和文档理解方面。通过 Amazon Bedrock 平台，用户可以方便地接入该模型，利用其强大的功能来提升工作效率。
news.impact: Grok 4.3 的推出将为企业用户提供更高效的 AI 支持，尤其是在合同审查、金融文档分析等领域。其可配置的推理能力使得用户能够根据具体需求调整模型的响应速度与深度，从而优化决策过程。此外，企业可以通过安全的 API 接入，确保数据的安全性与合规性。
useCases: 配置 Grok 4.3 的推理努力级别，优化响应时间与准确性，满足不同业务需求。
利用 Grok 4.3 进行合同审查，快速识别关键条款与潜在风险，提升审查效率。
通过图像输入功能，分析财务报表中的图形数据，生成结构化输出。
在客户支持场景中调用工具，自动化处理常见问题，提高客户满意度。
进行多轮对话，利用 Grok 4.3 处理复杂查询，提供更人性化的交互体验。
risks: 使用 Grok 4.3 时需注意 API 调用的配额限制，避免超出使用限制导致服务中断。
确保使用的 IAM 凭证安全，避免长时间使用长期密钥，降低安全风险。
在不同区域使用时，注意 Mantle 端点的 URL 格式，确保正确调用。
Grok 4.3 的默认参数与标准 OpenAI 规范有所不同，需根据需求进行调整。
在处理长文档时，需关注上下文窗口的限制，确保信息完整性。
news.reason: Grok 4.3 提供了强大的推理能力和灵活的接入方式，是企业用户提升工作效率的理想选择。
news.originalContent: Artificial Intelligence Introducing Grok on Amazon Bedrock This post is co-written with Eric Jiang from xAI (SpaceXAI). xAI’s Grok 4.3 is now generally available on Amazon Bedrock, giving teams that build agents and AI workflows a model that reasons reliably over long inputs. With this launch, xAI joins Amazon Bedrock as a model provider. Grok 4.3 is a model with configurable reasoning effort. It offers strong tool use and instruction following for building agents, and token efficiency for high-volume inference. It accepts text and image input, and has a 1 million token context window for long documents and multi-turn sessions. The model runs on Mantle, the next-generation inference engine in Amazon Bedrock. This post covers what makes Grok 4.3 a great fit for agentic and enterprise workloads, how you access it through Amazon Bedrock, and how to use the capabilities most teams reach for first: a basic chat request, configurable reasoning effort, tool calling, structured output, image input, and stateful multi-turn conversations. Why Grok 4.3 is a great fit for agentic and reasoning workloads According to xAI, Grok 4.3 is built for enterprise work where accuracy matters . On its own benchmarks at the time of the model launch, xAI reports it outperforms various industry benchmarks. Grok 4.3 ranked #1 on the Artificial Analysis Omniscience benchmark with the lowest hallucination rate among the frontier models it compared. It also placed #1 on the Artificial Analysis Tau2 Telecom benchmark for tool calling in customer support scenarios, and #1 on the Vals AI Case Law and Corporate Finance benchmarks for document understanding. xAI also places the model on the intelligence-versus-cost Pareto frontier, which it describes as 2 to 10 times more intelligence per dollar than other frontier models. With Grok 4.3, you can control how much the model thinks before answering through an effort level on each request. You configure the effort level ( none , low , medium , and high ) per request and let one model serve the full range of work. A classification call can run at none effort to keep latency low. A contract analysis or case law task can run at high when depth matters more than response time. Grok 4.3 accepts text and image input and returns text, and its 1 million token context window leaves room for long documents and extended multi-turn sessions. The model handles tool calling and instruction following well, which is what makes it practical for agents that depend on function calls to take action. These traits line up with use cases such as contract review, credit agreement analysis, and financial document question answering. In these cases, the model reasons over long inputs and then calls out to systems of record. How you access Grok 4.3 on Amazon Bedrock Grok 4.3 runs on Mantle, and accessing it differs from models that use the Amazon Bedrock Runtime API. Mantle uses OpenAI-compatible APIs. You can invoke Grok 4.3 either with the OpenAI SDK or through direct HTTPS requests to the Chat Completions API or the Responses API. The Mantle endpoint URL is Region-specific and follows this pattern: For example, in us-west-2 the base URL is https://bedrock-mantle.us-west-2.api.aws/openai/v1 . Note that the Responses API URL route differs slightly on the Mantle endpoint ( /openai/v1/ ) from the Runtime endpoint ( /v1/responses ). To set up your SDK with Grok 4.3, set the base URL with the correct Region and path as described in the preceding section. When using Grok, note that the context window is 1 million tokens and that the defaults depart from the standard OpenAI specification in three places: temperature defaults to 0.7 rather than 1 . top_p defaults to 0.95 rather than 1 . max_completion_tokens defaults to 131072 . Set these explicitly if your application needs different behavior. Authenticate and run a first request You have two ways to authenticate against the Mantle endpoint, and both work with the same OpenAI SDK. For production, we recommend short-term bearer tokens generated from your IAM credentials, because they expire automatically and keep access tied to your IAM identity. Use a long-term Amazon Bedrock API key for quick exploration and getting started. Restrict long-lived keys to that purpose rather than embedding them in production applications. The following example shows how to authenticate with a long-term Amazon Bedrock API key to access the model. Treat this as an exploration-only credential. You can generate one from the Amazon Bedrock console , and then install the OpenAI SDK: pip install openai Point the client at the regional Mantle endpoint and authenticate with your API key. The model ID is xai.grok-4.3 : from openai import OpenAI client = OpenAI( api_key="<your Amazon Bedrock API key>", base_url="https://bedrock-mantle.us-west-2.api.aws/openai/v1", ) response = client.chat.completions.create( model="xai.grok-4.3", messages=[ {"role": "user", "content": "In one sentence, what is Amazon Bedroc

news.title: Amazon Bedrock 发布企业搜索解决方案，简化知识库构建
news.summary: Amazon Bedrock 现已推出 Managed Knowledge Base，提供全托管的企业搜索解决方案，简化知识库的构建和检索过程。该服务支持多种数据源接入，并具备实时访问控制，帮助企业快速获取所需信息。
keyPoints: Amazon Bedrock 的 Managed Knowledge Base 现已全面上线，提供高效的知识库构建和检索解决方案。
该服务支持六种原生连接器，包括 Amazon S3、Microsoft SharePoint 和 Google Drive，简化数据接入流程。
Managed Knowledge Base 具备实时访问控制，确保数据安全性，避免潜在的权限问题。
该解决方案支持多种文档格式的解析，最大支持 PDF、音频和视频文件，提升信息检索的灵活性。
Syngenta Group 和 MRH Trowe 等企业已成功应用该服务，显著提高了内部知识搜索的效率。
news.background: Amazon Bedrock 于 2023 年推出的 Managed Knowledge Base，旨在解决企业在构建知识库时面临的复杂性。传统上，团队需要整合多个组件，如连接器、解析器和存储解决方案，耗时耗力。Managed Knowledge Base 通过提供全托管服务，简化了这一过程，使企业能够快速搭建知识库并进行高效检索。与以往需要数天或数周的手动搭建相比，该服务通过 AWS 管理控制台可在几分钟内完成首次检索，极大提升了企业的响应速度。
news.impact: Managed Knowledge Base 的推出将改变企业内部信息检索的方式，尤其是对于需要快速获取信息的团队。企业如 Syngenta Group 和 MRH Trowe 已经在内部应用该服务，提升了员工的工作效率和信息获取能力。随着越来越多的企业采用这一解决方案，预计将推动知识管理领域的变革，促使更多企业重视数据的整合与利用。此外，该服务的实时访问控制功能将增强企业数据的安全性，降低信息泄露的风险。
useCases: 通过 Managed Knowledge Base 快速构建企业知识库，提升信息检索效率。
利用原生连接器同步 SharePoint 和 Confluence 数据，支持内部知识搜索。
实现多格式文档的自动解析，简化信息获取流程。
risks: API 使用费用可能较高，企业需评估成本与收益。
在数据接入过程中，可能面临配额限制，影响大规模数据处理。
对非英语文档的支持可能有限，需确认兼容性。
news.reason: Amazon Bedrock 的 Managed Knowledge Base 通过全托管的方式，极大简化了企业知识库的构建和检索过程，值得关注。
news.originalContent: Artificial Intelligence Build enterprise search for agents with Amazon Bedrock Managed Knowledge Base Knowledge bases that ground agents and generative AI applications over your enterprise data are hard to build at scale. Teams typically stitch together connectors, parsers, vector stores, knowledge graphs, and retrieval logic, then operationalize all of it for production. Each piece brings its own challenges. You must decide which data sources to connect and how to parse multimodal document types. You must choose between graph and vector databases, then provision and scale them. You must also handle complex queries that reason across diverse content, and layer on the document-level access control, observability, and security that production demands. Amazon Bedrock now offers Managed Knowledge Base in general availability, a fully managed agentic retrieval solution that handles scaling, high-accuracy retrieval, and document access control on your behalf. You can connect your enterprise data sources or crawl the web and start ingesting. Getting started through the AWS Management Console requires no model selection. Sensible defaults take you from zero to your first retrieval in minutes, compared to the days or weeks typically needed to assemble a comparable pipeline from scratch. When you’re ready to customize, you have control over embedding models, rerankers, chunking strategies, and more. In this post, we walk through the three pillars that make this possible: simplified setup, smarter retrieval, and production readiness. We also show you code examples for setting up a knowledge base and retrieving from it. Simplified setup Developers today typically procure and build data ingestion pipelines, vector or graph storage, and retrieval infrastructure separately. This means managing separate infrastructure, separate billing models, separate rate limits, and the complexity of piecing it all together into a coherent pipeline. Managed Knowledge Base abstracts this complexity away. You configure a knowledge base, and the service handles everything downstream, from ingesting enterprise data through native connectors to managing vector stores on your behalf. Native enterprise connectors with ACL support Managed Knowledge Base includes six native connectors ( Amazon Simple Storage Service (Amazon S3), Microsoft SharePoint , Atlassian Confluence , Google Drive , Microsoft OneDrive , and Web Crawler). It also includes a direct ingestion API for documents that don’t live in a supported source. On subsequent syncs, the service processes only modified or new documents, reducing time, cost, and staleness. Managed Knowledge Base uses real-time access control list (ACL) checks as an additional layer of security on top of existing pre-retrieval ACL filtering. The pre-filtered documents are transient for the life of the API call and are not visible to large language models (LLMs) or users. This maintains current access controls by checking permissions directly with the authoritative source at query time, rather than relying on potentially stale or incorrectly mapped ACL data. Syngenta Group uses Bedrock Managed Knowledge Bases to enable employees to create knowledge bases on demand, syncing data from SharePoint and Confluence for internal knowledge search and agentic RAG applications. – Jason Krohn, Head of Data and AI Technology MRH Trowe is using Bedrock Managed Knowledge Bases to power an internal AI Copilot that gives employees instant, grounded answers from across our corporate knowledge base — spanning thousands of documents in Confluence and SharePoint, in both English and German. With native connectors and built-in access controls, our teams can search across policies, client documentation, and operational content without building custom retrieval pipelines — accelerating how our employees access the knowledge they need to serve clients. – Dr. Malte Polley, Teamleader Data Analytics & AI Parsing across multimodal data Your data fragments across many formats: machine-readable content in web applications, digital files containing embedded images like PDFs, PPTX, and DOCX, scanned documents, and media content such as audio and video. Rather than building separate pipelines for each format, Managed Knowledge Base provides fully managed parsing that automatically selects the right strategy per content type. It handles tables, charts, diagrams, mixed layouts, and media without configuration from you. The service supports visual content documents (PDFs, PPT/PPTX, DOCX) up to 500 MB, audio files up to 2 GB, and video files up to 10 GB. After the service parses content, it splits the content into segments for retrieval. By default, Managed Knowledge Base decides on the most suitable chunking strategy on your behalf. If you understand your data and want more control, you can choose a custom strategy like fixed-size chunking, where you set the approximate token size, or no chunking, for documents that are already pre-processed or

news.title: 使用 NVIDIA NeMo Automodel 和 🤗 Diffusers 大规模微调视频与图像模型
news.summary: NVIDIA 和 Hugging Face 联手推出 NeMo Automodel，支持在 Hugging Face Hub 上无缝微调扩散模型。该工具简化了模型训练流程，用户可快速实现从数据预处理到生成的全流程，适用于多种扩散模型，提升了训练效率和灵活性。
keyPoints: NeMo Automodel 是一个开源的 PyTorch 训练库，专为扩散模型设计，支持 Hugging Face Hub 上的模型。
用户可以直接使用 Hub 上的预训练权重，无需进行检查点转换，简化了模型的使用流程。
支持全量微调和 LoRA 风格的参数高效微调，用户可根据需求选择最佳方案。
NeMo Automodel 允许用户在不同规模的 GPU 集群上灵活配置训练，适应多种计算资源。
集成的微调食谱涵盖多种流行的扩散模型，如 Wan 2.1 和 FLUX.1-dev，便于用户快速上手。
news.background: NVIDIA 和 Hugging Face 的合作旨在解决扩散模型训练中的技术挑战，尤其是在大规模训练时的内存效率和配置灵活性。NeMo Automodel 作为一个开源工具，提供了与 Hugging Face 的无缝集成，使得研究人员和开发者能够更高效地进行模型微调。近年来，扩散模型在图像和视频生成领域取得了显著进展，NeMo Automodel 的推出将进一步推动这一领域的发展。
news.impact: 这一工具的推出将使得研究人员和开发者能够更快速地实现模型的微调和部署，降低了技术门槛。尤其对于需要生成高质量图像和视频的应用场景，如游戏开发和影视制作，NeMo Automodel 将显著提升工作效率。此外，企业在进行模型训练时可以更灵活地选择计算资源，优化成本和时间投入。
useCases: 使用 NeMo Automodel 微调 Wan 2.1 模型，生成高质量的文本到视频内容。
通过 Hugging Face Hub 下载预训练模型，快速启动图像生成项目。
在多 GPU 环境中配置 NeMo Automodel，进行大规模的模型训练。
利用 LoRA 风格微调，优化模型在特定任务上的表现，节省计算资源。
集成 NeMo Automodel 到现有的机器学习工作流中，提升模型开发效率。
risks: 在使用 NeMo Automodel 时，需注意 API 调用的配额限制，避免超出使用范围导致服务中断。
确保所用的 GPU 硬件与 NeMo Automodel 兼容，避免因硬件不匹配导致的训练失败。
在选择微调策略时，需评估模型大小与计算资源的匹配，避免因资源不足导致训练效率低下。
使用过程中可能会遇到不同版本的库之间的兼容性问题，需定期检查更新。
在进行模型微调时，需关注数据集的质量，低质量数据可能导致模型性能下降。
news.reason: NeMo Automodel 提供了高效的扩散模型微调方案，适合需要快速生成高质量图像和视频的开发者，值得关注。
news.originalContent: Back to Articles a]:hidden"> Fine-tune video and image models at scale with NVIDIA NeMo Automodel and 🤗 Diffusers Enterprise + Article Published July 17, 2026 Upvote 7 +1 Pranav Prashant Thombre pthombre Follow nvidia linnan wang linnanwang Follow nvidia Alexandros Koumparoulis akoumpa Follow nvidia Wenwen Gao wgao2021 Follow nvidia Sylendran Arunagiri Sylendran95 Follow nvidia Bernard Nguyen bernardwin Follow nvidia A joint post from NVIDIA and Hugging Face. Special thanks to Sayak Paul from Hugging Face for their contributions to the integration work and for co-authoring this blog. Diffusion models power some of the most exciting open-source releases of the last two years — such as FLUX.1-dev for text-to-image and Wan 2.1 and HunyuanVideo for text-to-video. The 🤗 Diffusers library has become the de facto home for these models, giving researchers and builders a single, consistent interface for inference, adaptation, and pipeline composition. In addition, training and fine-tuning diffusion models are also on the rise, requiring utilities that offer memory-efficient sharding, latent caching, multiresolution bucketing, and configurations that scale gracefully from one GPU to hundreds. To cater to these technical demands, we offer the NVIDIA NeMo Automodel open-source library. Today, we're highlighting the collaboration between NVIDIA and Hugging Face that brings production-grade, distributed diffusion training to any Diffusers-format model on the Hugging Face Hub — with no checkpoint conversion and no model rewrites for any new model. The integration is documented in the Diffusers training guide and is fully open source under Apache 2.0. Table of contents What is NeMo Automodel? Supported diffusion models What this collaboration unlocks A look at the fine-tuning workflow 1. Pre-encode the dataset 2. Launch training with the existing FLUX YAML 3. Generate from the fine-tuned checkpoint 4. Performance Other Finetuned/LoRA examples Try it today Coming next: Pythonic recipe APIs Resources What is NeMo Automodel? NeMo Automodel is an open-source PyTorch DTensor-native training library, part of the NVIDIA NeMo framework, built around two design principles that matter for the Diffusers ecosystem: Hugging Face native. Point pretrained_model_name_or_path at any Diffusers model ID on the Hub and start training. NeMo Automodel uses Diffusers model classes (e.g. WanTransformer3DModel ) for loading and Diffusers pipelines ( WanPipeline ) for generation. Checkpoints round-trip cleanly back into the Diffusers ecosystem. One program, any scale. The recipes and training scripts can be easily modified to suit training at any scale. Parallelism is a configuration choice, not a code rewrite — switch between FSDP2, tensor parallel, expert parallel, context parallel, and pipeline parallel by declaring configurations, not rewriting models. AutoModel currently supports flow-matching models only. Under the hood, it uses flow matching as the training objective, with latent-space training (via pre-encoded VAE outputs) and multiresolution bucketed dataloading to accelerate throughput. Supported diffusion models NeMo Automodel integration ships with ready-to-use fine-tuning recipes for the open diffusion models below. The list reflects the recipes currently in examples/diffusion/finetune . Model Hugging Face ID Task Parameters LoRA recipe Wan 2.1 T2V 1.3B / 14B Wan-AI/Wan2.1-T2V-1.3B-Diffusers Wan-AI/Wan2.1-T2V-14B-Diffusers Text-to-Video 1.3B (fits on a single 40GB A100) / 14B Yes Wan 2.2 T2V A14B Wan-AI/Wan2.2-T2V-A14B-Diffusers Text-to-Video 27B total (MoE), 14B active per step No FLUX.1-dev black-forest-labs/FLUX.1-dev Text-to-Image 12B Yes FLUX.2-dev black-forest-labs/FLUX.2-dev Text-to-Image 32B Yes HunyuanVideo 1.5 hunyuanvideo-community/HunyuanVideo-1.5-Diffusers-720p_t2v Text-to-Video 13B Yes Qwen-Image Qwen/Qwen-Image Text-to-Image 20B (MMDiT) Yes What this collaboration unlocks For Diffusers users, the practical gains break down into a few concrete capabilities. No checkpoint conversion. Pretrained weights from the Hub work out of the box. There's no separate "training format" to convert to, then convert back. Your fine-tuned checkpoint loads directly into a DiffusionPipeline for inference, or back to the Hub for sharing. Downstream tools — quantization, compilation, LoRA adapters, custom samplers — all keep working. Fast path to new model support. When a new diffusion model lands in Diffusers, enabling it in NeMo Automodel takes a small, contained code addition — a data preprocessing handler and a model adapter — rather than a full custom training script. The rest of the recipe stack (FSDP2, bucketed dataloading, checkpointing, generation) carries over unchanged, and the same YAML-driven workflow applies. Full and parameter-efficient fine-tuning. news.title: Google Vids 更新：轻松创建和编辑视频
news.summary: 我注意到 Google Vids 最近推出了两个新功能，Gemini Omni 和个人头像，让视频创作变得前所未有的简单。用户现在可以通过自然语言生成和编辑高质量视频，并创建个性化的数字头像来代替自己出镜。这些更新不仅提升了视频制作的效率，还让更多人能够轻松参与到创作中来。
keyPoints: Google Vids 新增 Gemini Omni 功能，用户只需简单文本提示即可生成和编辑高质量视频。
通过上传自拍和语音录音，用户可以创建个性化的数字头像，轻松在视频中代替自己出镜。
Gemini Omni 支持逐步编辑，用户可以用日常语言描述想要的修改，轻松调整视频内容。
每个 AI 生成的视频都会附带数字水印，确保内容的透明性和真实性。
这些新功能目前对 Google AI Pro 和 Ultra 订阅用户开放，部分地区的用户可使用个人头像功能。
news.background: Google Vids 近年来不断更新，致力于简化视频创作流程。随着 Veo 3.1 的推出，用户已经能够更方便地生成视频。此次推出的 Gemini Omni 进一步降低了视频编辑的门槛，用户只需用简单的文本描述即可生成想要的内容。同时，个人头像功能的加入，让那些不愿意出镜的用户也能轻松参与视频制作，极大丰富了创作方式。这些更新标志着 Google 在 AI 视频工具领域的持续创新。
news.impact: 这些新功能将吸引更多内容创作者和普通用户使用 Google Vids，尤其是那些希望快速制作视频的社交媒体用户。通过简化创作流程，用户可以更专注于内容本身，而不必担心复杂的技术细节。此外，数字头像的使用可能会改变视频内容的呈现方式，减少对传统拍摄设备的依赖，推动视频创作的普及和多样化。
useCases: 使用 Gemini Omni 生成视频，快速创建内容以满足社交媒体发布需求。
通过个人头像发送个性化视频消息，提升与客户或观众的互动体验。
在教育场景中，利用 AI 工具制作教学视频，节省时间并提高教学效果。
为市场营销活动制作宣传视频，快速响应市场变化，增强品牌影响力。
利用简单的文本描述编辑已有视频，轻松调整内容以适应不同受众。
risks: 使用 AI 生成内容可能面临版权问题，用户需确保遵循相关法律法规。
个人头像功能的使用受地区限制，部分用户可能无法访问该功能。
AI 生成的视频可能缺乏人类创作的细腻和情感，影响内容的吸引力。
数字水印虽然提高了透明度，但也可能被不法分子利用，造成误导。
API 使用可能涉及费用和配额限制，用户需提前了解相关政策。
news.reason: 这次更新让视频创作变得更加简单和高效，尤其适合那些希望快速制作内容的用户，值得一试。
news.originalContent: Create, edit and star in videos with two Google Vids updates Jul 16, 2026 | x.com Facebook LinkedIn Mail Copy link Gemini Omni and personal avatars in Google Vids make video creation easier than ever. Now you can generate and edit high-quality clips using everyday language, and create a custom digital avatar to star in your videos. Justin Luk Product Manager Share x.com Facebook LinkedIn Mail Copy link . Inlining them here makes them available in the DOM for the page. --> Your browser does not support the audio element. Listen to article [[duration]] minutes This content is generated by Google AI. Generative AI is experimental Voice Speed Voice Speed 0.75X 1X 1.5X 2X Read AI-generated summary Google Vids now features Gemini Omni, which lets you generate and edit high-quality videos using simple text prompts and image references. You can also create a digital avatar to deliver messages for you by uploading a selfie and a voice recording. Check your eligibility for these tools and start experimenting with your next video project today. Summaries were generated by Google AI. Generative AI is experimental. Google Vids just added two new features to help you create better videos faster. Use Gemini Omni to generate or edit high-quality clips with simple text prompts. Easily swap backgrounds or fix lighting by just describing what you want to change. Create a digital avatar to star in videos without needing a camera or recording. Every AI-generated clip includes a digital watermark to keep your content transparent and honest. Summaries were generated by Google AI. Generative AI is experimental. Google Vids now uses AI to help you make videos just by typing what you want to see. You can even edit your clips by simply describing the changes you need. If you don't want to be on camera, you can create a digital avatar that looks and sounds like you. Every AI-made video gets a special watermark so people know it was generated. Summaries were generated by Google AI. Generative AI is experimental. Explore other styles: General summary Bullet points Basic explainer Today, we’re rolling out two new updates to Google Vids to make it easier than ever to create, edit and personalize your videos: Gemini Omni and personal avatars. Gemini Omni takes the hard work out of the editing process, so generating and refining high-quality clips is as easy as writing a simple prompt. And with personal avatars, you have an entirely new way to star in videos without setting up a camera. Here’s a look at how these new tools transform video creation. Generate videos from text and images In the past year, you’ve created millions of videos in Google Vids to share your stories and bring your ideas to life. In February, we made the process simpler by rolling out Veo 3.1 to all users, helping everyone generate videos within Vids. Now, we’re bringing Gemini Omni to Vids, so you can create and edit high-quality videos just by describing what you want to see. Start with a simple text prompt in natural language, and add image references — like a photo or a rough sketch — for more detail. Omni mixes your inputs to generate a video that matches your vision. Chat to edit, step-by-step Getting a video exactly right often requires a few tweaks after that first draft — and making those edits is now as easy as describing what you want to see. Whether you're refining a video you generated with Omni or a clip you shot on your phone, you can use everyday language to prompt Vids to swap backgrounds, fix lighting or add effects. Because Omni supports step-by-step edits, you can now make changes to your videos without starting from scratch. Star in videos, instantly Want to send a quick video update or personalized shout-out, but don't have time to get camera-ready? With new personal avatars, you can create a digital avatar that looks and sounds like you. Just upload a selfie and a short voice recording. From there, type what you want to say and your avatar will deliver the message — no recording required. Gemini Omni and personal avatars are available in Google Vids for Google AI Pro and Ultra subscribers and Google Workspace business customers . Access to personal avatars is currently limited to users in certain regions who are 18 or older. Personal avatars are linked to a user’s Google Account and are restricted to the account holder’s likeness. Create and share with transparency We want you to feel confident sharing what you create. To ensure content transparency, every generated clip includes an invisible SynthID digital watermark. This allows people to verify that a video was created with AI, so you can explore your creativity and share your AI videos responsibly. Come see what you can create with Gemini Omni and personal avatars in Google Vids . Check your inbox to confirm your subscription. Y

news.title: OpenAI 为青少年提供安全 AI 访问权限的措施
news.summary: OpenAI 正在通过引入适合年龄的保护措施、学习工具、家长控制和专家合作，使 ChatGPT 对青少年更安全。此举旨在满足青少年对安全 AI 的需求，同时确保他们在使用 AI 工具时的保护和教育。
keyPoints: OpenAI 正在为青少年提供更安全的 ChatGPT 访问权限，确保符合年龄的保护措施。
引入家长控制功能，允许家长监控和管理孩子的使用情况。
与教育专家合作，开发适合青少年的学习工具，提升他们的 AI 使用体验。
此举响应了对青少年安全使用 AI 的日益关注，尤其是在社交媒体和在线学习环境中。
OpenAI 的新措施可能会影响其他 AI 开发者，促使行业内更多关注青少年用户的安全。
news.background: 随着 AI 技术的快速发展，青少年对 AI 工具的需求日益增加。然而，许多 AI 应用程序在内容和交互上可能不适合年轻用户，存在安全隐患。OpenAI 作为行业领先者，意识到这一问题，决定采取措施保护青少年用户。与其他 AI 开发者相比，OpenAI 的新策略更为全面，涵盖了技术、教育和家长参与等多个方面。类似的案例包括其他科技公司在推出儿童友好的产品时所采取的措施，但 OpenAI 的整合方式更具前瞻性。
news.impact: OpenAI 的新措施将使青少年用户能够更安全地使用 AI 工具，促进他们在学习和社交中的积极参与。家长的参与将增强对 AI 技术的信任，可能会改变家庭对 AI 的使用态度。此外，其他 AI 开发者可能会受到启发，开始关注青少年市场，推动行业整体向更安全的方向发展。
useCases: 使用 ChatGPT 进行作业辅导，获取适合年龄的学习资源。
家长通过控制面板监控孩子的 AI 使用情况，确保安全。
教育工作者利用 OpenAI 的工具开发互动课程，提升学生的学习兴趣。
risks: API 价格可能会影响开发者的使用成本，尤其是在大规模应用时。
家长控制功能的复杂性可能导致部分用户无法有效使用。
对青少年用户的监管可能面临法律和道德挑战，需谨慎处理。
news.reason: OpenAI 的措施为青少年提供了安全的 AI 使用环境，值得关注其在教育和家庭中的潜在影响。

news.title: Google 在 2026 年 7 月 16 日推出 AI 模式下的应用连接功能
news.summary: Google 宣布用户可以在 AI 模式下安全地连接和互动他们常用的服务，如 Instacart、Canva 和 YouTube Music。这一功能旨在简化日常任务，提高效率。
keyPoints: 用户可以在 AI 模式下直接连接常用应用，提升工作效率。
支持的应用包括 Instacart、Canva 和 YouTube Music，用户可轻松管理购物清单和设计项目。
该功能于 2026 年 7 月 16 日在美国开始逐步推出，预计将扩展到更多应用。
通过连接应用，用户可以在搜索结果中直接添加购物车商品，或保存音乐播放列表。
Google 的这一更新旨在通过个性化智能提升搜索体验。
news.background: 2026 年 7 月 16 日，Google 宣布推出在 AI 模式下连接应用的功能，用户可以直接在搜索中链接常用服务。这一功能的推出标志着 Google 在整合 AI 和日常应用方面的进一步努力，旨在通过简化用户的日常任务来提升效率。与之前的 AI 功能相比，此次更新更加注重用户体验，允许用户在不离开搜索页面的情况下完成多项任务。类似的功能在其他平台上也有推出，但 Google 的整合能力和用户基础使其具有独特优势。
news.impact: 这一功能将对用户的日常生活产生显著影响，尤其是那些依赖于在线购物和设计服务的用户。通过直接在搜索中连接应用，用户可以更快速地完成购物、项目规划等任务，减少了在不同应用之间切换的时间。此外，这一更新可能会促使其他科技公司加速推出类似的整合功能，以提升用户体验。对于开发者而言，提供与 Google 的 AI 模式兼容的应用将成为新的市场机会，可能会引发一波新的应用开发热潮。
useCases: 连接 Instacart，快速添加购物清单中的商品。
使用 Canva 设计项目，直接获取模板选项。
在 YouTube Music 中创建和保存播放列表，提升聚会氛围。
risks: 可能面临 API 使用费用的增加，影响开发者的盈利模式。
连接应用的兼容性问题可能导致用户体验不佳。
数据隐私和安全性问题仍需关注，尤其是在处理个人信息时。
news.reason: 这一功能通过简化用户的日常任务，提升了搜索的实用性，值得关注。

news.title: OpenAI 推出实用 AI 评分卡，评估投资回报率
news.summary: OpenAI 的首席财务官 Sarah Friar 介绍了一种实用的 AI 评分卡，旨在通过有效工作、成功任务的成本、可靠性和计算回报来衡量投资回报率（ROI）。该评分卡为企业提供了一种量化 AI 效益的工具，但在实际应用中仍面临一些挑战。
keyPoints: OpenAI 推出的评分卡可以量化 AI 的投资回报率，涵盖有效工作、成功任务成本等多个维度。
评分卡的设计旨在帮助企业更好地理解 AI 的实际效益，促进决策过程。
该评分卡强调了可靠性的重要性，企业可以通过此工具评估 AI 系统的稳定性。
评分卡的推出标志着 AI 应用的成熟，企业在投资 AI 时可以参考这一标准。
OpenAI 评分卡的实施可能需要企业进行系统调整，以适应新的评估标准。
news.background: OpenAI 最近推出了一种新的 AI 评分卡，旨在帮助企业评估其 AI 投资的回报率。随着 AI 技术的快速发展，企业在选择和实施 AI 解决方案时，往往面临如何量化其效益的问题。评分卡通过提供有效工作、成功任务成本、可靠性和计算回报等指标，帮助企业更清晰地了解 AI 的实际表现。尽管类似的评估工具在市场上已有出现，但 OpenAI 的评分卡因其系统性和实用性而显得尤为突出。
news.impact: 这一评分卡的推出将影响众多企业的决策过程，尤其是在 AI 投资方面。企业可以利用这一工具来优化资源配置，提升投资回报率。同时，评分卡的实施可能促使更多企业关注 AI 系统的可靠性和有效性，从而推动整个行业的健康发展。然而，企业在使用评分卡时也需谨慎，避免过度依赖单一指标。
useCases: 评估新引入的 AI 工具的投资回报率，帮助企业做出更明智的投资决策。
通过评分卡分析现有 AI 系统的表现，识别改进空间。
为企业制定 AI 战略提供数据支持，确保资源的有效配置。
risks: 评分卡的有效性依赖于企业内部数据的准确性，若数据不完整或不准确，可能导致错误的评估结果。
企业在使用评分卡时，可能忽视其他重要的非量化因素，如员工培训和文化适应性。
评分卡的实施可能需要额外的时间和资源投入，企业需评估其成本效益。
news.reason: OpenAI 的评分卡为企业提供了一种量化 AI 效益的新工具，值得关注其在实际应用中的表现和局限性。

news.title: NVIDIA 发布 Nemotron 3 Embed 系列，8B 版本在 RTEB 基准上排名第一
news.summary: 我注意到 NVIDIA 最近推出了 Nemotron 3 Embed 系列，包含三个开源 checkpoint。其中，8B-BF16 版本在 RTEB 基准上以 78.46 的平均 NDCG@10 排名第一，表现相当出色。1B-NVFP4 版本在 Blackwell 上的吞吐量是 BF16 的两倍，且精度保持在 99.5%。所有模型的最大序列长度为 32,768 tokens。
keyPoints: Nemotron 3 Embed 系列包含三个开源 checkpoint，分别是 8B-BF16、1B-BF16 和 1B-NVFP4。
8B-BF16 版本在 RTEB 基准测试中以 78.46 的 NDCG@10 排名第一，显示出其卓越的检索能力。
1B-NVFP4 版本在 Blackwell 上的吞吐量是 BF16 的两倍，且保留了 99.5% 的精度。
所有模型均采用双向注意力掩蔽的 Transformer 编码器，最大序列长度为 32,768 tokens。
NVIDIA 还发布了针对 1B 模型的优化 NIM 微服务，性能优于 vLLM checkpoint。
news.background: NVIDIA 的 Nemotron 3 Embed 系列是针对生产规模的检索增强生成（RAG）和智能检索的最新成果。该系列模型的设计旨在提升信息检索的效率和准确性，尤其是在多语言环境下的表现。通过引入不同规模的模型，NVIDIA 使得开发者能够根据具体需求选择合适的模型，提升应用的灵活性和性能。与之前的模型相比，Nemotron 3 Embed 系列在多个基准测试中表现出色，尤其是在 RTEB 基准上，8B-BF16 版本的排名更是证明了其技术的领先性。
news.impact: 这款模型系列的发布将对多个领域产生深远影响。做 RAG 的工程师可以利用这些高效的嵌入模型提升信息检索的准确性，从而优化用户体验。电商平台的开发者可以通过更精准的检索结果来提升转化率。此外，研究人员也能借助这些模型进行更深入的多语言研究，推动自然语言处理技术的发展。整体来看，Nemotron 3 Embed 系列将为各类应用提供强有力的技术支持，促进智能检索和生成技术的广泛应用。
audience: 自然语言处理研究人员
useCases: 利用 Nemotron 3 Embed 8B-BF16 模型提升电商平台的搜索引擎性能，增加用户转化率。
在多语言环境下使用 1B-BF16 模型进行信息检索，确保准确性和高效性。
研究人员使用 Nemotron 3 Embed 系列进行自然语言处理的实验，推动相关技术的进步。
risks: 使用这些模型可能需要较高的计算资源，尤其是在处理大规模数据时，可能导致成本上升。
模型的商用授权和配额限制可能会影响开发者的使用灵活性，需仔细阅读相关条款。
在特定语言或领域的表现可能不如预期，开发者需进行充分的测试和验证。
news.reason: 这款模型系列在 RTEB 基准上表现优异，适合需要高效信息检索的应用场景，值得关注。
news.originalContent: Technology AI Shorts Artificial Intelligence Applications Editors Pick Language Model Embedding Model Large Language Model Machine Learning New Releases Open Source Staff Tech News Embedding models decide which passages an agent ever sees. NVIDIA released Nemotron 3 Embed model to work on that layer. It targets production-scale RAG, agentic retrieval, code retrieval, and agent memory. What is Nemotron 3 Embed? The model collection includes three open checkpoints. Nemotron-3-Embed-8B-BF16 is the accuracy-first option. Nemotron-3-Embed-1B-BF16 carries the same design into a smaller footprint. Nemotron-3-Embed-1B-NVFP4 is the Blackwell-optimized 4-bit path. All three are transformer encoders trained with bidirectional attention masking . The final embedding comes from average pooling over token-level representations. Maximum sequence length is 32,768 tokens on every checkpoint. Each model was evaluated across 34 languages. All three carry the OpenMDW License Agreement, version 1.1 (OpenMDW-1.1) . Notably, the bases are Mistral models. The 8B is built with Ministral-3-8B-Instruct-2512 . Both 1B variants use Ministral-3-3B-Instruct-2512 . Performance Nemotron-3-Embed-8B-BF16 ranks #1 overall on RTEB (as of July 17 2026), the Retrieval Embedding Benchmark. Evaluation covers its 16 public tasks. Every figure below is average NDCG@10, at model sequence length 4096. Model Params Emb dim RTEB ViDoRe-V3 text MMTEB (Retrieval) Nemotron-3-Embed-8B-BF16 ~8B 4096 78.46 60.60 75.45 Nemotron-3-Embed-1B-BF16 1.14B 2048 72.38 57.74 71.04 Nemotron-3-Embed-1B-NVFP4 1.14B 2048 72.00 — — llama-nemotron-embed-vl-1b-v2 — — 61.98 52.54 59.71 llama-nemotron-embed-1b-v2 — — 60.47 52.10 59.58 Two gaps are worth noting. The 1B gains 10.4 RTEB points over llama-nemotron-embed-vl-1b-v2 , the prior-generation baseline. Separately, NVFP4 costs 0.38 RTEB points against its BF16 parent, or 99.5% retention. How the 1B Model was Built ? Those 1B scores come from a compression pipeline, not a smaller training run. The parent was nemotron-3-embed-3b , pruned and distilled across two iterative rounds. First, the 3B parent was pruned to 2B using NVIDIA ModelOpt mcore_minitron Neural Architecture Search (NAS) . The search covers hidden width, FFN size, attention heads, and depth. It then picks the best candidate from the top-10 Pareto front. A 50k in-domain calibration corpus scored those candidates. Next, the 2B model was distilled from the fine-tuned 8B embedding teacher. Distillation combined cosine distance loss (COS) and mean squared error (MSE) loss. The data blend was multilingual and in-domain. Finally, the same procedure repeated to produce the 1.14B checkpoint. The NVFP4 Serving Tradeoff Compression then continues into the serving format. Quantization hit weights and activations of linear layers only, targeting the NVFP4 data type. The research team used nvidia-modelopt v0.45.0 . Quantization-Aware Distillation (QAD) followed, primarily to recover accuracy on long inputs. Calibration used 512 samples: 256 queries and 256 passages from abisee/cnn_dailymail . QAD training used 20k samples. The rsesearch team reports NVFP4 on Blackwell delivers up to 2x higher throughput than BF16 . It retains 99%+ of BF16 retrieval accuracy . The NVFP4 card also documents dynamic embedding sizes. You can slice the 2048-d vector from the start to 1024 or 512 dimensions. Re-normalize afterward. Interactive Explainer: The Five-Stage Retrieval Path Before touching code, watch the path run. It animates prefixing, bidirectional encoding, average pooling, L2 normalization, and dot-product scoring. Scores come from each card’s published expected output. Deployment Matrix As that walkthrough implies, the checkpoints do not share runtime paths. Feature 8B-BF16 1B-BF16 1B-NVFP4 Transformers / Sentence Transformers Yes Yes No vLLM for /v2/embed 0.25.0 0.25.0 0.25.0 Microarchitectures Ampere, Hopper, Blackwell Ampere, Hopper, Blackwell Ampere, Hopper, Lovelace, Blackwell Test hardware A100 80GB, H100 80GB A100 80GB, H100 80GB GB200, RTX 6000 PRO, A100, H100, L40, L4 Training data 50M+ samples 8.5M+ (distillation) 20k (QAD) Alongside the checkpoints, NVIDIA research team released an optimized NIM microservice for the 1B model. The Rust-based NIM matches or outperforms the vLLM checkpoint on GB200 and RTX PRO 6000. NVIDIA tested input sequence lengths of 256 and 1024. Separately, NVIDIA NeMo AutoModel recipes cover fine-tuning and distillation. Using It in Code With those paths in mind, prefixes come first. Queries take query: and documents take passage: . Embeddings are L2-normalized, so dot product equals cosine similarity. Copy Code Copied Use a different Browser # pip install --upgrade "transformers>=5.2.0" "sentence-transformers>=5.4.1" import torch from sentence_transformers import SentenceTransformer QUERIES = ["How can someone reduce exposure to pollen during allergy season?"] DOCUMENTS = ["People with pollen allergy can reduce exposure by staying indoors " "

news.title: Google Vids 推出 Gemini Omni 与个人数字分身功能
news.summary: Google Vids 最近推出了 Gemini Omni 和个人数字分身功能，前者允许用户通过自然语言和图片生成高质量视频，后者则支持用户上传自拍和语音录制后生成数字分身。这两项功能面向 Google AI Pro、Ultra 订阅者及 Google Workspace 商业客户开放，所有生成内容均带有不可见的 SynthID 数字水印，提升了内容的安全性与可追溯性。
keyPoints: Gemini Omni 允许用户通过自然语言提示和图片生成视频，提升了视频制作的便捷性和创意性。
个人数字分身功能支持用户上传自拍和语音，用户只需输入文字即可生成数字分身，增强了个性化体验。
这两项功能目前仅对 Google AI Pro 和 Ultra 订阅者及 Google Workspace 商业客户开放，显示出其针对高端市场的定位。
所有生成的内容都带有 SynthID 数字水印，确保内容的版权和来源可追溯，提升了用户的信任感。
Google Vids 的更新进一步巩固了其在视频生成领域的竞争力，尤其是在与其他视频编辑工具的比较中。
news.background: Google Vids 作为视频生成和编辑领域的重要参与者，近年来不断推出创新功能以满足用户需求。Gemini Omni 的推出标志着其在自然语言处理和图像生成技术上的进步，用户可以通过简单的提示生成高质量视频，极大地降低了视频制作的门槛。此外，个人数字分身功能的引入，反映了市场对个性化和互动性内容的需求日益增长。与其他同类产品相比，Google Vids 的这些新功能不仅提升了用户体验，还在技术上实现了突破，尤其是在内容生成的安全性和可追溯性方面。
news.impact: 这两项新功能将吸引大量创作者和企业用户，尤其是那些需要快速生成高质量视频内容的市场参与者。通过简化视频制作流程，用户能够更专注于创意而非技术细节，从而提升整体生产效率。此外，数字分身功能的推出可能会改变用户与数字内容的互动方式，推动个性化内容的普及，进而影响广告、教育等多个行业的内容创作和传播策略。
useCases: 生成高质量视频：使用 Gemini Omni 通过自然语言提示快速生成创意视频，节省制作时间。
创建个性化数字分身：上传自拍和语音，生成个性化数字分身用于在线课程或社交媒体。
提升品牌宣传：利用新功能制作吸引人的广告视频，增强品牌影响力。
简化内容制作流程：团队成员通过 Gemini Omni 协作，快速迭代视频内容，提高工作效率。
增强用户互动：通过数字分身与观众进行实时互动，提升用户参与感。
risks: API 价格波动可能影响用户的使用成本，尤其是对小型企业和个人创作者。
生成内容的合规性和版权问题仍需关注，尤其是在商业用途时，可能面临法律风险。
数字水印技术的有效性和安全性需持续验证，以防止内容被恶意篡改或盗用。
用户数据隐私问题可能引发监管关注，尤其是在涉及个人图像和声音的情况下。
功能的兼容性和稳定性可能影响用户体验，尤其是在不同设备和平台上使用时。
news.reason: Google Vids 的新功能在视频生成和个性化内容方面实现了技术突破，值得关注其对创作者和企业的深远影响。

news.title: xAI 起诉用户滥用 Grok 生成儿童性虐待内容
news.summary: xAI 对一名 Grok 用户提起诉讼，指控其利用该模型制作儿童性虐待图像。这一诉讼标志着 xAI 对 Grok 能生成此类内容的首次承认，案件聚焦于用户的滥用行为，而非模型本身的技术缺陷。
keyPoints: xAI 首次承认 Grok 可用于生成儿童性虐待图像，改变了之前的立场。
诉讼对象 Terry Wayne Harwood 被控利用 Grok 制作和传播儿童性虐待材料，已被逮捕。
Harwood 使用至少两个复杂用户名的账户，持续数月生成非法内容。
xAI 的诉讼指出，Harwood 违反了用户协议，进行不当请求。
案件可能影响未来对 Grok 的使用和监管，涉及数千名潜在受害者。
news.background: xAI 最近对一名 Grok 用户提起诉讼，指控其利用该模型生成儿童性虐待图像。这一诉讼标志着 xAI 对其模型潜在滥用的首次承认。此前，xAI 一直否认 Grok 能生成此类内容，然而随着案件的进展，xAI 的立场发生了变化。诉讼的焦点在于用户的滥用行为，而非模型本身的技术缺陷。Harwood 被指控利用 Grok 制作和传播儿童性虐待材料，案件引发了对人工智能模型使用的广泛关注。
news.impact: 这一事件可能会影响 xAI 的法律责任和未来的商业决策。如果法院支持 xAI 的立场，可能会减轻其在未来类似案件中的法律责任。此外，案件的进展可能促使其他用户更加谨慎地使用 Grok，避免法律风险。同时，这一事件也可能引发对人工智能模型监管的讨论，影响行业标准的制定。
useCases: 分析 Grok 的使用案例，识别潜在的滥用行为，确保合规性。
开发针对 Grok 的内容监控工具，防止生成不当内容。
为用户提供关于合法使用 AI 模型的培训，降低法律风险。
与法律机构合作，建立举报机制，及时处理滥用行为。
研究 AI 模型的伦理使用，推动行业自律和规范。
risks: 使用 Grok 可能面临法律风险，用户需了解相关法律法规。
模型生成内容的不可预测性可能导致意外的法律后果。
API 使用可能受限于配额，影响模型的正常使用。
不同版本的 Grok 可能存在兼容性问题，需注意更新。
滥用行为可能导致用户账户被封禁，影响正常使用。
news.reason: 这一事件揭示了人工智能模型使用中的法律和伦理问题，值得关注。
news.originalContent: Text settings Story text Size Small Standard Large Width * Standard Wide Links Standard Orange * Subscribers only Learn more Minimize to nav Facing mounting pressure to acknowledge that Grok can still be used to generate non-consensual sexualized images of adults and minors, xAI filed a lawsuit Tuesday, suing the first user that Elon Musk’s firm has accused of using its chatbot to create illegal content. The complaint targets Terry Wayne Harwood, who was arrested earlier this year for possession and distribution of child sexual abuse materials (CSAM), the South Carolina attorney’s office announced . As xAI alleged, the company assisted in that arrest after discovering that Harwood had been using two xAI accounts for months to undress or “nudify” non-sexual images of multiple victims, including a young girl who appeared to be as young as 10. xAI’s lawsuit comes a little more than a week after a different young girl joined a proposed class action representing several kids allegedly harmed by Grok. She alleged that her stepfather committed suicide after he was discovered using Grok , possibly in conjunction with other AI tools, to create 7,000 sexualized images of her and then distribute them on the dark web. In that case, the victim alleged that xAI refused to help police identify the user who uploaded her image to Grok. To support claims that it is xAI’s common practice, her lawyers cited a 2026 National Center for Missing & Exploited Children (NCMEC) report confirming that 90 percent of xAI’s CyberTipline reports “were not actionable by law enforcement because xAI declined to include user information that would allow law enforcement to track and locate perpetrators.” As victims accused X of shielding predators, Musk had previously maintained that he had not seen any examples of Grok-generated CSAM. Rather than move to restrict Grok’s outputs to make CSAM outputs impossible, Musk warned users to act responsibly, posting on X on January 3 that “anyone using Grok to make illegal content will suffer the same consequences as if they upload illegal content.” While Musk was posting through it, though, Harwood was allegedly ignoring Musk’s warning and prompting Grok as many times as it took to get the chatbot to generate likely nonconsensual explicit images. Now Musk seemingly can’t deny that Grok makes CSAM. xAI’s lawsuit claimed that Harwood used at least two accounts with convoluted usernames—“ceae2cb4-a9f6-4885-8ae9-6e2096d084f4” and “befccb94-4029-454d-9f1f-0d4945e8fa7c”—to generate illegal content from December 8 to February 18. Sometimes Grok safeguards did prevent harmful outputs, “refusing to follow” some of the prompts “on the basis that such material violated Grok’s content moderation guardrails.” The lawsuit includes an example of an especially creepy prompt that Grok rejected, using phrases like “white slime” to mask intent to generate sexualized images. That particular prompt may have been rejected for an obvious reason, though. Harwood explicitly asked the chatbot to “remove all her clothing,” which directly violates xAI user terms against requests to undress real people. In the proposed class action, it’s alleged that xAI overlooks a lot of bad requests, only reporting to NCMEC one prompt to depict “gang rape” out of 7,000 harmful outputs in the most recent victim’s case. Likely to avoid other bad actors circumventing safeguards, xAI did not include examples of Harwood’s successful prompts or describe methods used to bypass filters. xAI only alleged that Harwood modified prompts to get around safeguards “in clear violation of the xAI Terms of Service and of US law,” including “some” requests for “obscene” images involving the “likeness of minor children.” A spokesperson for the South Carolina attorney general’s office told Ars that Harwood’s case is still pending. Specifically, he has been charged with “distributing, transporting, exhibiting, receiving, selling, purchasing, exchanging, or soliciting CSAM that was ‘through the use of an artificial intelligence platform.’” The spokesperson was not authorized to verify if Grok was the platform used. However, xAI’s complaint alleged that “upon information and belief, at least some of the images at-issue in the Harwood Criminal Action were generated or altered through Defendant’s violative use of Grok.” xAI did not immediately respond to Ars’ request to comment. xAI’s plan to blame users In the lawsuit, xAI makes its case for why only users should be liable for Grok-generated CSAM. If the court agreed, such a finding could strengthen xAI’s defense in the looming potential class action, which lawyers estimate could involve thousands of victims. It could also give xAI a hammer to bring down on other users any time a victim comes forward with a complaint. xAI said that it was partly suing Harwood for breach of contract to avoid “substantial legal fees” and the “risk of considerable liability for damages” that may be sought if any of his alleged victims sues

news.title: 预训练与后训练的推理能力研究
news.summary: 这项研究通过国际象棋作为实验平台，深入探讨了预训练与强化学习（RL）在推理任务中的相互作用。研究表明，在给定的RL计算量下，后训练性能可以通过预训练损失进行准确预测，且随着预训练token数量的增加，RL奖励曲线的斜率呈线性提升。对于1B参数的数学语言模型，较长的预训练检查点在RL下表现更佳，提升速度更快。
keyPoints: 研究使用国际象棋作为受控实验平台，分析预训练与后训练的关系。
在1B参数的数学语言模型中，较长的预训练检查点在RL下表现更优。
RL奖励曲线的斜率与预训练token数量呈近似线性关系。
后训练性能可以通过预训练损失进行准确预测。
研究结果表明，RL不仅仅是优化现有策略，还能发现新的有效策略。
news.background: 本研究旨在填补预训练与后训练之间的知识空白，尤其是在强化学习（RL）如何影响大型语言模型（LLMs）的推理能力方面。传统上，预训练和后训练被视为两个独立的阶段，缺乏系统性的研究来揭示它们之间的联系。通过将国际象棋作为实验平台，研究团队能够在一个可控的环境中分析模型在不同训练阶段的表现。这种方法不仅降低了实验的复杂性，还提供了清晰的结果，帮助理解预训练的选择如何影响后续的RL计算效果。
news.impact: 这项研究的发现对多个领域的开发者和研究人员具有重要意义。首先，做强化学习的工程师可以利用这些结果优化模型训练流程，选择合适的预训练参数以提高后训练效果。其次，学术界的研究人员可以基于这些发现设计新的实验，进一步探索预训练与后训练的关系。此外，AI产品经理可以借此调整产品策略，确保在模型开发中充分利用预训练的优势，从而提升产品的推理能力。
audience: 开发大型语言模型的工程师
参与AI模型评估的研究人员
useCases: 优化模型训练流程，选择合适的预训练参数以提升后训练效果。
设计新的实验，探索预训练与后训练的关系，推动学术研究进展。
调整AI产品策略，利用预训练的优势提升产品推理能力。
开发新的推理任务，基于研究结果设计更有效的模型。
评估现有模型性能，参考研究中的奖励曲线分析进行改进。
risks: 在使用RL进行后训练时，可能会面临高昂的计算成本，影响项目预算。
预训练数据的选择可能导致模型在特定任务上的表现不佳，需谨慎处理。
不同模型架构对RL的适应性可能不同，需进行充分的实验验证。
在多语言环境中，模型的表现可能不如预期，需考虑语言的多样性。
强化学习的调优过程复杂，可能导致开发周期延长，影响项目进度。
news.reason: 这项研究提供了对预训练与后训练之间关系的深入理解，揭示了如何通过优化预训练来提升模型的推理能力，值得关注。
news.source: AIHOT · HuggingFace Daily Papers（社区热门论文）
news.originalContent: --> Computer Science > Machine Learning arXiv:2607.16097 (cs) [Submitted on 17 Jul 2026] Title: Understanding Reasoning from Pretraining to Post-Training Authors: Jingyan Shen , Ang Li , Salman Rahman , Yifan Sun , Micah Goldblum , Matus Telgarsky , Pavel Izmailov View a PDF of the paper titled Understanding Reasoning from Pretraining to Post-Training, by Jingyan Shen and 6 other authors View PDF HTML (experimental) Abstract: Reinforcement learning (RL) has become central to improving large language models (LLMs) on complex reasoning tasks, yet RL post-training is largely studied in isolation from the pretraining that precedes it. As a result, two basic questions remain open: (1) how do pretraining choices (model size, data) shape the returns to RL compute, and (2) what does RL actually do to the model? These questions are difficult to study in the standard LLM setting: pretraining corpora are vast and uncontrolled, making it hard to attribute behaviors to pretraining versus RL, and systematic compute sweeps across both stages are prohibitively expensive. To address these challenges, we use chess as a controlled testbed for studying reasoning across the full pretraining-to-post-training pipeline. We follow the standard LLM training pipeline by pretraining language models from 5M to 1B parameters on human chess games, supervised fine-tuning on synthetic reasoning traces, and running RL on chess puzzles with verifiable rewards. Using this framework, we find that the post-RL performance at given RL compute level is well-predicted from the pretraining loss, and slope of the RL reward curves improves approximately linearly with the pretraining tokens. Beyond scaling, we find that RL does not simply sharpen the SFT policy: on easy puzzles it amplifies correct moves the SFT policy already preferred, while on hard puzzles it surfaces correct moves that were nearly absent under SFT. We further test whether our findings transfer beyond chess by training a 1B language model on math-domain text, where the same predictive pattern emerges: longer-pretrained checkpoints reach higher post-RL performance and improve faster under RL. In sum, we provide a quantitative account of the pretraining-to-RL interface and a controlled testbed for studying the science of reasoning across the full pretraining-to-post-training pipeline. news.title: RecGPT-V3 在淘宝的应用与成效分析
news.summary: RecGPT-V3 是一种状态化混合模态推荐系统，已在淘宝成功部署。该系统通过状态化行为建模和潜在意图推理，显著降低了用户建模计算量，提升了多项关键指标，如 IPV 增加 1.28%、CTR 提升 1.00%、GMV 增加 3.97%，同时减少了 52.4% 的资源消耗。这些成果表明，RecGPT-V3 在提升用户体验和商业效益方面具有显著成效。
keyPoints: RecGPT-V3 通过状态化行为建模和混合模态基础模型，降低用户建模计算量 55.8%。
在淘宝的"猜你喜欢"信息流中，IPV 提升 1.28%，CTR 提升 1.00%。
该系统的端到端服务资源消耗降低了 52.4%，显示出显著的成本效益。
潜在意图推理将输出 token 成本降低了 200 倍，提升了系统的经济性。
RecGPT-V3 结合自然语言和语义 ID，优化了用户理解和商品匹配的效率。
news.background: RecGPT-V3 是在前两代模型基础上发展而来的，前者通过用户理解和多代理推理提升了推荐系统的性能。然而，随着规模的扩大，RecGPT 系列面临了计算效率和信息传递的瓶颈。RecGPT-V3 通过引入状态化建模和潜在意图推理，解决了这些问题，提升了推荐的准确性和效率。与传统推荐系统相比，RecGPT-V3 更加注重用户行为的长期分析和实时反馈，适应了电商平台的动态需求。
news.impact: RecGPT-V3 的成功部署将影响电商领域的推荐系统设计，推动更多企业采用类似的状态化和混合模态技术。电商平台可以通过更精准的推荐提升用户粘性和购买转化率，从而优化营销策略和资源配置。此外，其他行业如内容推荐和社交媒体也可能借鉴这一技术，推动整体用户体验的提升。
useCases: 优化电商平台的商品推荐，提升用户购买率。
分析用户行为数据，制定个性化营销策略。
开发新一代推荐算法，提升系统的响应速度和准确性。
整合多模态数据，提升用户画像的全面性。
降低计算资源消耗，提升系统的经济效益。
risks: 系统依赖于大量用户数据，可能面临隐私保护和数据合规性问题。
潜在意图推理的复杂性可能导致模型的可解释性下降，影响用户信任。
在不同市场环境中，模型的适应性和效果可能存在差异，需谨慎评估。
高计算需求可能导致硬件成本上升，影响中小企业的实施能力。
模型更新和维护的复杂性可能增加运维成本，影响长期使用。

news.originalContent: --> Computer Science > Information Retrieval arXiv:2607.15591 (cs) [Submitted on 17 Jul 2026] Title: RecGPT-V3 Technical Report Authors: Bowen Zheng , Chao Yi , Dian Chen , Gaoyang Guo , Han Zhu , Jiakai Tang , Jian Wu , Mao Zhang , Wen Chen , Yifan Lu , Yujie Luo , Yuning Jiang , Zhujin Gao , Bo Zheng , Dixuan Wang , Hao Fang , Jiancai Liu , Jing Yu , Ke Chen , Kewei Zhu , Mingke Xu , Wenjun Yang , Xunke Xi , Zile Zhou View a PDF of the paper titled RecGPT-V3 Technical Report, by Bowen Zheng and 23 other authors View PDF HTML (experimental) Abstract: Large language models (LLMs) are transforming recommender systems from matching co-occurrence patterns in historical behavior toward reasoning about the intent that drives it. RecGPT-V1 pioneered this paradigm on Taobao by centering user understanding, and RecGPT-V2 scaled it via coordinated multi-agent reasoning; both are deployed in production with consistent gains in user experience and commercial outcomes. However, operating RecGPT at scale reveals three challenges: (1) stateless behavior modeling, where each request reprocesses full user history, wasting computation and discarding prior analysis; (2) a tag-to-item information bottleneck, where natural-language tags form a lossy channel between user understanding and item grounding; and (3) inefficient explicit reasoning, whose lengthy chain-of-thought incurs untenable latency and compute overhead. We present RecGPT-V3, a stateful, hybrid-modal recommender that reasons over natural language for open-world knowledge and Semantic IDs (SIDs) for concrete item grounding. A Memory Hub maintains structured, continually evolving user memory that distills long-horizon behavior into condensed units, cutting user-modeling computation by 55.8%. A Hybrid-modal Foundation Model allows the LLM jointly reason over text tags and SIDs, opening a high-bandwidth channel into the item space. Latent Intent Reasoning internalizes verbose rationales into compact learnable latent tokens that remain decodable into readable explanations, lowering output token cost by 200x. Deployed in Taobao's "Guess What You Like" feed, RecGPT-V3 achieves consistent gains in large-scale online A/B tests: IPV +1.28%, CTR +1.00%, TC +1.97%, GMV +3.97%, while cutting end-to-end serving resource consumption by 52.4%. news.title: 通义实验室发布 Wan-Streamer v0.2，响应延迟仅 550ms
news.summary: 我注意到通义实验室刚发布了 Wan-Streamer v0.2，这款全新的端到端全模态模型将听、看、说、演四种功能整合在一个 Transformer 中。它的响应延迟仅为 550ms，输出分辨率从之前的 192×336 提升至 640×368 @ 25FPS，同时采用了 Thinker-Performer 双通路架构，确保了画质的提升与低延迟的完美平衡。
keyPoints: Wan-Streamer v0.2 是一款全新的端到端全模态模型，整合了听、看、说、演的功能。
该模型的响应延迟仅为 550ms，极大提升了用户体验。
输出分辨率从 v0.1 的 192×336 提升至 640×368 @ 25FPS，画质显著改善。
采用 Thinker-Performer 双通路架构，兼顾了画质与延迟的平衡。
此版本的发布标志着通义实验室在全模态技术领域的又一次突破。
news.background: 通义实验室一直致力于推动全模态模型的发展，Wan-Streamer v0.2 的发布是其技术进步的体现。与之前版本相比，新版本在响应速度和画质上都有了显著提升，尤其是在实时交互场景中，低延迟的表现尤为重要。全模态模型的整合使得用户能够在同一平台上实现多种交互方式，提升了使用的便利性和灵活性。
news.impact: 这款模型将对多个领域产生深远影响，尤其是在教育、娱乐和在线会议等场景中，能够提供更流畅的互动体验。开发者可以利用这一技术来构建更智能的应用，提升用户的参与感和满意度。此外，随着全模态技术的普及，相关的商业决策也将受到影响，企业可能会重新评估其产品和服务的交互方式，以适应这一新趋势。
useCases: 集成 Wan-Streamer v0.2 到在线教育平台，提升实时互动效果。
在游戏中使用该模型，实现更自然的角色对话与互动。
利用低延迟特性，优化视频会议软件的用户体验。
开发基于该模型的虚拟助手，提供更智能的用户交互。
在社交媒体应用中应用全模态功能，增强用户参与感。
risks: 可能面临 API 使用费用的挑战，尤其是在高并发场景下。
需要确保模型的商用授权，避免法律风险。
不同语言的支持可能存在局限，影响全球用户的使用体验。
硬件要求较高，可能导致部分用户无法顺利使用。
兼容性问题可能会影响与现有系统的集成。
news.reason: 这款模型在响应速度和画质上的突破，值得关注，尤其是对需要实时交互的应用场景。

news.title: Anthropic 用 Claude Code 成功迁移百万行代码至 Rust
news.summary: 这次发布的核心点是，Anthropic 工程师利用 Claude Code 在短短两周内将 Bun 的百万行 Zig 代码成功迁移至 Rust，且所有现有测试均通过。迁移过程中，虽然合并后出现了 19 个回归问题，但已全部修复。此外，另一工程师在周末将 Python 代码库迁移至 16.5 万行 TypeScript，显示出 AI 在代码迁移中的高效性。
keyPoints: Anthropic 工程师在两周内完成了百万行 Zig 代码到 Rust 的迁移，所有现有测试通过。
迁移过程中合并后出现 19 个回归问题，已全部修复，确保了代码质量。
另一工程师在周末完成了 16.5 万行 Python 代码迁移至 TypeScript，显示出高效性。
迁移总成本约为 16.5 万美元，但编译时间从八分钟降至两秒，二进制启动速度提升 6 倍。
Claude Code 的新功能使得大规模代码迁移变得更加高效，改变了传统的开发流程。
news.background: 在过去，代码迁移通常需要数年时间，但 Anthropic 的工程师们通过使用 Claude Code，成功将 Bun 的百万行 Zig 代码在两周内迁移至 Rust。这一过程不仅提升了代码的性能，还确保了现有功能的完整性。Jarred Sumner 和 Mike Krieger 分别负责了 Zig 和 Python 代码的迁移，展示了 AI 在代码迁移中的潜力。与传统的手动迁移相比，AI 的介入显著缩短了开发周期，并降低了风险。
news.impact: 这一技术进步将对多个开发团队产生深远影响。首先，使用 Claude Code 的团队可以更快地适应技术变化，减少因语言选择不当而导致的技术债务。其次，开发者在进行代码迁移时，能够更轻松地处理回归问题，降低了项目失败的风险。此外，这种高效的迁移方式将吸引更多企业考虑使用 AI 工具来优化他们的开发流程，可能会引发行业内的广泛变革。
useCases: 使用 Claude Code 进行大规模代码迁移，提升项目开发效率。
在短时间内完成语言迁移，确保现有功能不受影响。
利用 AI 工具快速修复合并后的回归问题，降低开发风险。
通过迁移至更高效的语言，提升应用性能和启动速度。
为团队提供更灵活的开发流程，减少技术债务。
risks: 迁移过程中可能会出现意想不到的回归问题，需额外的测试和修复时间。
API 使用成本较高，可能会影响项目预算，需提前评估。
在迁移过程中，团队可能需要同时维护两个代码库，增加了管理复杂性。
不同语言之间的兼容性问题可能导致额外的开发工作。
对新语言的学习曲线可能影响团队的短期生产力。
news.reason: 这条信息展示了 AI 在代码迁移中的实际应用，值得关注其对开发流程的影响。
news.originalContent: How Anthropic runs large-scale code migrations with Claude Code A step-by-step guide to running large code migrations with AI agents — including Bun's million-line Zig-to-Rust port. Category Claude Code Enterprise AI Product Claude Code Date July 16, 2026 Reading time 5 min Share Copy link https://claude.com/blog/ai-code-migration Code migrations, projects that port a production codebase to a new language, were multi-year endeavors until recently. In the last month, individual developers at Anthropic migrated 10 code packages consisting of tens to hundreds of thousands of lines of code using Claude Fable 5, Claude Opus 4.8, and dynamic workflows . In this article we’ll cover two examples along with best practices from these projects. Jarred Sumner, co-founder of Bun and Member of Technical Staff at Anthropic, used Claude Code to migrate Bun from Zig to Rust . A million lines of code were produced in less than two weeks, with 100% of Bun's existing test suite passing in CI before merge. Nineteen regressions surfaced after merge and have all been fixed. The Rust port was shipped inside Claude Code in June. Mike Krieger, co-lead of Anthropic Labs, migrated a Python codebase to 165,000 lines of TypeScript over a weekend. This included hundreds of agents, eight phase gates, three adversarial review rounds, and a final parity check that diffed every command's output against the Python original. Claude Code’s new capabilities change the math for these long-deferred projects. Below is the six-step process we now use, drawn from what these migrations taught us. The core insight is that you don’t fix the code. You fix the process (loop) that produced the code . Why and when to migrate languages Before going straight into the how , it’s worth discussing the when and why because the assumptions around these projects have evolved. Teams launch migrations because of landscape changes between their initial build and current project. Either a known trade-off has become limiting, a better approach has emerged, or the original ecosystem is shrinking. For example, Jarred originally chose Zig because it offered C-level performance with radical simplicity, ideal for a solo founder “writing Bun in 1 year in a cramped Oakland apartment pre-LLM.” This simplicity came with known tradeoffs, which he writes about here . Fast forward to 2026. Bun's CLI is getting over 10 million monthly downloads and is used extensively within Claude Code. As recently as last quarter, those tradeoffs wouldn’t have been enough to justify freezing the roadmap and committing resources to a multi-quarter project. Migrating languages can deliver smaller, faster, and safer systems, but no one wants to pay for them. Software engineers have also had to contend with the career risk inherent in these formerly mega-projects. You could maintain two parallel code bases for quarters or years, and if the end result was 90% parity, you had a bigger headache than when you started. Now, the worst case scenario is you delete the branch and try again. There still needs to be a justifiable business case. While million line migrations no longer cost $3 to $4 million in engineering resources over the course of a four year project, they still cost tens to hundreds of thousands of dollars or more to execute. The Bun migration, for example, consumed 5.9 billion uncached input tokens and 690 million output tokens — around $165,000 at API pricing. The main portion of Mike’s port was 27 million tokens. Jarred’s million-line PR. However, the migration case no longer needs to be existential. A year of memory-bug patches in the changelog, or one chronic bottleneck, can now justify it. The compile step was the impetus for Mike's project. The internal tool his team works on ships to users as a single binary. Producing that binary with the Python toolchain took roughly eight minutes per platform, totaling a 30-minute wait across the build matrix on every release. After the port, the same compile now takes about two seconds, the binary starts 6x faster, and the team was able to retire a separate deployment pipeline. Why AI changes the code migration math Claude Fable 5 is our most capable, generally available model. Fable and Opus 4.8 are particularly good at delegating, directing, and verifying parallel workstreams with subagents while finding multiple paths towards stated goals. Large code migrations are a particularly effective use case for these advanced models because: The work is parallel . Work can be executed across thousands of independent units such as files and crates, so agents can work at the same time rather than have one waiting on the other. Context is clear and comprehensive. The old code serves as a great spec for the model. It also serves as a core reference to help build the guide for translation agents to follow. There is a built-in referee . Many large codebases will include a test suite that agents can use to verify their work. Agents perf

news.title: Kimi K3 以 1679 分登顶前端编码榜，挑战闭源巨头
news.summary: Kimi K3 在 Frontend Code Arena 以 1679 分夺得第一，超越 Claude Fable 5 和 GPT-5.6 Sol，展现出强大的前端编码能力。该模型采用 2.8 万亿参数的 MoE 架构，拥有百万上下文窗口，并于 7 月 27 日开放权重。尽管其 API 定价为每百万 tokens 15 美元，仍然吸引了开发者的关注，但其高价策略可能限制了部分用户的使用。
keyPoints: Kimi K3 在 Frontend Code Arena 以 1679 分登顶，超越 Claude Fable 5 和 GPT-5.6 Sol，展现出强大的编码能力。
该模型采用 2.8 万亿参数的 MoE 架构，具备百万上下文窗口，适合复杂的编码任务。
Kimi K3 在 7 个前端细分赛道中获得 6 个第一，显示出其在多领域的优越性能。
模型权重将于 7 月 27 日开放，意味着开发者可以直接使用其强大的编码能力。
API 定价为每百万 tokens 15 美元，虽然对标闭源模型，但可能对小型开发团队造成负担。
news.background: Kimi K3 的发布标志着中国开源模型在前端编码领域的崛起，打破了 Claude 和 GPT 的双头垄断。其在 Frontend Code Arena 的表现不仅是技术实力的体现，更是开发者对其潜力的认可。与以往的模型相比，K3 的 MoE 架构和大参数量使其在处理复杂编码任务时表现出色。然而，市场上对其性能的解读存在争议，部分观点认为其超越其他模型的结论是选择性解读的结果。
news.impact: Kimi K3 的成功可能会改变开发者对开源模型的看法，尤其是在前端开发领域。随着模型权重的开放，更多开发者将能够利用其强大的编码能力，推动项目的创新与发展。然而，高昂的 API 定价可能会使一些小型团队望而却步，从而影响其广泛应用。此外，K3 的崛起可能会促使其他模型加速更新，以应对市场竞争。
useCases: 利用 Kimi K3 进行复杂的前端项目开发，提高编码效率和质量。
在教育环境中使用 Kimi K3 作为编程教学工具，帮助学生理解前端开发。
开发团队使用 Kimi K3 进行快速原型设计，缩短产品迭代周期。
企业利用 Kimi K3 进行数据分析和报告生成，提升业务决策的准确性。
开源社区使用 Kimi K3 进行工具开发，推动技术共享与合作。
risks: API 定价较高，可能对小型开发团队造成经济压力，限制其使用范围。
模型的开放权重可能导致安全性和隐私问题，开发者需谨慎使用。
Kimi K3 的性能在不同应用场景下可能存在差异，需进行充分测试以确保适用性。
news.reason: Kimi K3 的崛起不仅展示了中国开源模型的实力，也为开发者提供了新的选择，值得关注其未来发展。

news.title: 苹果向约40名前OpenAI员工发律师函，法律战升级
news.summary: 苹果公司已向约40名前OpenAI员工发出律师函，要求保存与商业秘密诉讼相关的文件。这一举动是在苹果起诉OpenAI及两名前员工后采取的，指控其通过挖角获取苹果的商业机密以加速AI硬件研发。苹果寻求法院禁令，阻止OpenAI使用其信息并要求归还机密。
keyPoints: 苹果已向约40名前OpenAI员工发出律师函，要求保存相关文件，显示出对商业秘密泄露的高度关注。
苹果在2026年7月10日正式起诉OpenAI及两名前员工，指控其通过挖角获取商业机密，涉及未发布产品和供应商关系等信息。
诉状中提到，Tang Tan在苹果工作24年，曾负责iPhone和Apple Watch的设计，离职后成为OpenAI首席硬件官。
Chang Liu在2026年1月离职后加入OpenAI，苹果指控其在离职后保留了苹果的笔记本电脑并多次未经授权访问内部网络。
苹果称目前已有超过400名前员工在OpenAI工作，显示出两家公司之间的人才流动情况。
苹果寻求法院禁令，要求OpenAI停止使用任何苹果信息，并要求归还所有商业秘密的副本。
OpenAI对此回应称未发现任何证据支持苹果的指控，强调专注于自身的创新技术。
news.background: 苹果与OpenAI的法律纠纷源于苹果对其商业秘密的保护意识增强。苹果在AI硬件领域的竞争日益激烈，尤其是在与OpenAI等新兴公司的竞争中。苹果的诉讼不仅涉及到具体的商业秘密泄露，还反映了科技行业中人才流动的复杂性。与此类似，过去也有多起科技公司因员工跳槽而引发的法律纠纷，显示出行业内对知识产权保护的重视程度不断提升。
news.impact: 此次法律战可能会对OpenAI的硬件研发计划产生重大影响，尤其是在苹果寻求法院禁令的情况下。如果法院支持苹果的请求，OpenAI可能面临技术开发受限的局面。此外，这一事件可能会导致其他科技公司在招聘时更加谨慎，避免因挖角而引发法律风险。同时，苹果的举动也可能促使行业内对商业秘密保护的进一步重视，影响未来的商业合作模式。
useCases: 分析法律文件，评估苹果与OpenAI的诉讼风险。
制定人才流动政策，确保公司在招聘时不侵犯竞争对手的商业秘密。
评估AI硬件市场的竞争格局，调整产品研发策略。
监控行业内法律动态，及时调整合规措施。
与法律顾问合作，确保公司在技术开发中不违反商业秘密法规。
risks: 若法院支持苹果的禁令，OpenAI可能面临技术开发受限，影响其市场竞争力。
苹果的诉讼可能导致OpenAI在招聘时面临更高的法律风险，影响其人才吸引力。
法律纠纷可能使OpenAI的投资者对其未来发展产生疑虑，影响融资能力。
若苹果成功索赔，OpenAI可能面临巨额经济损失，影响其财务健康。
行业内对商业秘密的关注度提升，可能导致更多公司采取激进的法律措施，增加行业竞争的复杂性。
news.reason: 此次苹果与OpenAI的法律战不仅涉及商业秘密的保护，还反映了科技行业内人才流动与竞争的复杂性，值得关注。
news.originalContent: 苹果与 OpenAI 法律战升级：约 40 名前员工收到苹果律师函 - IT之家 首页 IT圈 最会买 设置 日夜间 随系统 浅色 深色 主题色 黑色 投稿 订阅 RSS订阅 收藏IT之家 软媒应用 App客户端 要知App 软媒魔方 业界 手机 电脑 测评 视频 AI 苹果 iPhone 鸿蒙 软件 智车 数码 学院 游戏 直播 5G 微软 Win10 Win11 专题 搜索 首页 > IT资讯 > 苹果 苹果与 OpenAI 法律战升级：约 40 名前员工收到苹果律师函 2026/7/17 19:10:01 来源： IT之家 作者： 问舟 责编： 问舟 评论： 感谢IT之家网友 斯文当不了饭吃 的线索投递！ IT之家 7 月 17 日消息，据《金融时报》今日报道，苹果已向目前就职于 OpenAI 的约 40 名前苹果员工发出法律警告，要求他们保存可能与此案相关的文件和通信记录。 此举是苹果上周对 OpenAI 提起商业秘密诉讼后的最新动作，表明苹果认为涉嫌泄密的范围可能超出最初诉状中列出的个人。 2026 年 7 月 10 日，苹果公司向美国加州北区联邦地区法院提交了一份长达 41 页的诉状，正式起诉 OpenAI 及两名前苹果员工 ——OpenAI 首席硬件官 Tang Tan 和前苹果系统电气工程师 Chang Liu。苹果在诉状中指控 OpenAI 策划了一场系统性的“挖角”行动，通过招募苹果前员工获取未发布产品、零部件和供应商关系等高级商业机密，以加速其消费级 AI 硬件设备的研发。 根据诉状内容，Tang Tan 在苹果任职长达 24 年，曾担任 iPhone 和 Apple Watch 产品设计负责人，离职后出任 OpenAI 首席硬件官。Chang Liu 则于 2026 年 1 月离开苹果后加入 OpenAI 硬件团队。苹果指控 Tan 在 OpenAI 面试过程中使用机密项目代号向求职者打探苹果未发布产品的信息，而 Liu 则在离职后保留了苹果配发的笔记本电脑，并利用身份验证漏洞在 2026 年 1 月多次未经授权访问苹果内部网络，下载了数十份机密文件，包括技术演示文稿和未发布产品的规格说明。苹果称，Liu 在发现仍能访问公司网络后，曾给一位同事发短信写下“LOL”（类似于“笑死了”）。 苹果在诉状中表示，目前已有超过 400 名苹果前员工在 OpenAI 工作。苹果在 2026 年 2 月曾致函 OpenAI，要求对方说明防范措施、调查情况与补救安排，但 OpenAI“从未回应”。据 NBC 新闻调查，2026 年 2 月 23 日 17 时 53 分，苹果外部律师 Gabriel Gross 将首封邮件发给 OpenAI 总法律顾问 Che Chang，主题为“OpenAI 前苹果员工保留非公开、机密和专有信息”，并附上 PDF 信函和三份附件。13 分钟后，Gross 在同一邮件链中发送第二封邮件，称“感谢刚才的电话”并表示将与苹果沟通后再联系，但事实上双方并未通过电话 —— 这封邮件本应发给另一位姓 Wang 的前苹果员工。次日早晨 Gross 发邮件致歉，承认误将邮件发给了 Chang。OpenAI 发言人 Drew Pusateri 表示，Chang 据此认为误会已澄清，因此未再回复。除上述往来外，OpenAI 没有记录显示苹果律师在起诉前还有后续接触。 苹果在诉状中写道：“这只是冰山一角。苹果无法看到 OpenAI 紧闭的大门背后发生了什么，在那里，这种不当行为已被领导层正常化并成为典范。”苹果称 OpenAI“尚处于萌芽阶段的硬件业务，如今建立在最不稳固的基础之上，因非法依赖盗用的商业秘密而从核心开始腐朽”。 苹果正寻求法院发布禁令，要求 OpenAI 在开发 AI 硬件设备过程中停止使用任何苹果信息。苹果还要求 OpenAI 归还所有商业秘密与机密信息的副本，并追究 Tang Tan 和 Chang Liu 违反劳动合同的责任。此外，苹果还在寻求经济赔偿。 OpenAI 发言人回应称，“没有发现任何证据表明这项投诉具有依据”。OpenAI 则表示，“我们对其他公司的商业秘密不感兴趣，我们仍专注于打造赋能全球人民的创新技术”。 两家公司的关系在 2024 年曾一度密切 —— 当时苹果与 OpenAI 达成合作，将 ChatGPT 整合进 iPhone 系统。但此后双方关系逐渐降温：OpenAI 于 2025 年以约 65 亿美元（IT之家注：现汇率约合 440.72 亿元人民币）收购了苹果前设计总监 Jony Ive 创立的硬件公司 io Products；苹果则决定在新版 Siri 中用谷歌 Gemini 模型取代 ChatGPT。 广告声明：文内含有的对外跳转链接（包括不限于超链接、二维码、口令等形式），用于传递更多信息，节省甄选时间，结果仅供参考，IT之家所有文章均包含本声明。 投诉水文 我要纠错 下载IT之家APP，签到赚金币兑豪礼 相关文章 关键词： OpenAI ， 苹果 苹果和 OpenAI 商业纠纷细节：2 封关键邮件、13 分钟间隔与 1 次姓名混淆 苹果和 OpenAI 商业诉讼核心人物：Tang Tan 职业路径曝光，曾参与开发 iPod / iPhone OpenAI 首度回应苹果诉讼：相信公平竞争，未发现任何证据 苹果与 OpenAI 闹僵后，外媒称前苹果首席设计师乔纳森 · 艾维或无法置身事外 分析师：即使窃密指控未获证实，苹果诉讼仍可能重创 OpenAI 硬件计划 彭博社揭秘苹果起诉 OpenAI 内幕：前员工一句“哈哈”成窃密关键 软媒旗下网站： IT之家 最会买 - 返利返现优惠券 iPhone之家 Win7之家 Win10之家 Win11之家 软媒旗下软件： 软媒手机APP应用 魔方 最会买 要知

news.title: ChatGPT 工作区新增文档、表格与幻灯片编辑功能
news.summary: 我注意到 ChatGPT 工作区现在支持创建和编辑文档、电子表格以及幻灯片，功能非常强大。这个更新让我们在日常工作中可以更高效地处理各种文档，提升了协作体验。@nickbaumann_ 还提供了详细的操作演示，值得一看。
keyPoints: ChatGPT 工作区新增文档、表格和幻灯片编辑功能，用户可以在同一平台上完成多种任务。
该功能支持多种格式，用户可以轻松创建和分享精美的文档，提升工作效率。
操作简单直观，@nickbaumann_ 提供了详细的演示，帮助用户快速上手。
此更新适用于所有 ChatGPT 用户，特别是需要频繁处理文档的团队。
功能上线后，已有超过 79.8K 人次观看相关演示，显示出用户的高度关注。
news.background: 随着远程办公和在线协作的普及，团队对高效的文档处理工具的需求日益增加。ChatGPT 工作区的这一更新正是为了满足这一需求，整合了文档、表格和幻灯片的编辑功能，用户无需切换工具即可完成多种任务。这种一体化的解决方案不仅提高了工作效率，也增强了团队协作的便利性。与其他单一功能的工具相比，ChatGPT 的这一更新显得尤为重要，尤其是在信息快速流动的现代工作环境中。
news.impact: 这一功能的推出将极大地方便需要频繁创建和编辑文档的用户，如项目经理、市场营销人员和内容创作者。通过整合多种编辑功能，用户可以更快速地完成工作，减少工具切换带来的时间浪费。此外，这也可能促使其他办公软件跟进，推动整个行业向更高效的方向发展。长远来看，这种集成化的工具将改变团队的工作方式，提升整体生产力。
useCases: 创建项目提案文档，使用 ChatGPT 的文档编辑功能，快速生成格式化的内容。
在团队会议中，利用幻灯片功能展示数据分析结果，提升汇报效率。
与同事协作编辑电子表格，实时更新数据，确保信息的准确性和时效性。
使用 ChatGPT 工作区整合不同类型的文档，便于项目管理和资料共享。
通过演示功能，向团队展示新产品的市场策略，增强沟通效果。
risks: 可能存在 API 调用次数限制，影响高频使用的用户体验。
在不同设备或浏览器上的兼容性问题，可能导致部分功能无法正常使用。
商用授权方面的限制，用户需注意使用条款以避免违规。
对于复杂的文档格式，可能会出现排版不兼容的问题，影响最终效果。
新功能的学习曲线，部分用户可能需要时间适应新的操作界面。
news.reason: 这个更新让我们在 ChatGPT 工作区中可以更高效地处理文档，值得一试！

news.title: NVIDIA 发布开源音频-视觉大语言模型 AV-Flamingo
news.summary: NVIDIA 推出的 AV-Flamingo 是一款专为长视频设计的开源音频-视觉大语言模型，旨在提升对复杂场景的理解与推理能力。该模型通过大规模数据集和创新的训练方法，表现出色，但仍面临一些局限性。
keyPoints: AV-Flamingo 是一款完全开源的音频-视觉大语言模型，专注于长视频的理解与推理，区别于以往主要针对短视频的模型。
该模型使用了约700万条真实视频的字幕和问答实例，强调时间、组合和跨模态推理能力，提升了模型的实用性。
AV-Flamingo 采用三阶段课程训练，从短期感知逐步过渡到长期多事件推理，增强了模型的学习能力。
模型在15个音频-视觉和多模态基准测试中表现优异，超越了同类开源模型，并在某些情况下超过了更大规模的闭源模型。
AV-Flamingo 的强大实用性使其能够有效转移到未见任务，展示了其鲁棒性和泛化能力。
news.background: AV-Flamingo 的推出标志着音频-视觉领域的一个重要进展，尤其是在处理长视频时。以往的模型多集中于短视频，限制了其应用范围。NVIDIA 通过大规模数据集和创新的训练方法，试图解决这一问题。该模型的设计不仅考虑了技术的先进性，还关注了实际应用场景，为研究人员和开发者提供了一个强大的工具。
news.impact: AV-Flamingo 的发布将影响多个领域的专业人士，包括视频分析、内容创作和教育等。它的高效推理能力可能改变视频内容的处理方式，帮助用户更好地理解复杂场景。此外，随着模型的开源，更多开发者将能够基于此进行创新，推动相关技术的发展。
useCases: 分析长视频中的音频与视觉信息，提取关键信息以支持决策。
开发基于 AV-Flamingo 的教育工具，帮助学生理解复杂的多媒体内容。
利用模型进行视频内容的自动化标注，提高工作效率。
在内容创作中，使用 AV-Flamingo 生成与视频内容相匹配的音频解说。
为视频监控系统提供智能分析，识别和理解事件的时间序列。
risks: 模型的开源可能导致滥用，尤其是在生成虚假信息或误导性内容方面。
由于训练数据的局限性，模型在某些特定场景下的表现可能不如预期，影响其可靠性。
对硬件的要求较高，可能限制了小型企业或个人开发者的使用。
在多语言支持方面，模型可能存在局限，无法有效处理非英语内容。
商业授权和使用条款可能会影响模型在特定行业的应用，需谨慎评估。
news.reason: AV-Flamingo 的推出为音频-视觉理解提供了新的思路和工具，尤其在长视频处理方面具有独特的价值。
news.source: AIHOT · HuggingFace Daily Papers（社区热门论文）
news.originalContent: --> Electrical Engineering and Systems Science > Audio and Speech Processing arXiv:2607.16107 (eess) [Submitted on 17 Jul 2026] Title: Audio-Visual Flamingo: Open Audio-Visual Intelligence for Long and Complex Videos Authors: Sreyan Ghosh , Arushi Goel , Kaousheik Jayakumar , Lasha Koroshinadze , Nishit Anand , Siddharth Gururani , Hanrong Ye , Pritam Biswas , Yuanhang Su , Ehsan Hosseini-Asl , Sang-gil Lee , Zhifeng Kong , Jaehyeon Kim , Sungwon Kim , S Sakshi , Ramani Duraiswami , Dinesh Manocha , Andrew Tao , Mohammad Shoeybi , Bryan Catanzaro , Ming-Yu Liu , Wei Ping View a PDF of the paper titled Audio-Visual Flamingo: Open Audio-Visual Intelligence for Long and Complex Videos, by Sreyan Ghosh and Arushi Goel and Kaousheik Jayakumar and Lasha Koroshinadze and Nishit Anand and Siddharth Gururani and Hanrong Ye and Pritam Biswas and Yuanhang Su and Ehsan Hosseini-Asl and Sang-gil Lee and Zhifeng Kong and Jaehyeon Kim and Sungwon Kim and S Sakshi and Ramani Duraiswami and Dinesh Manocha and Andrew Tao and Mohammad Shoeybi and Bryan Catanzaro and Ming-Yu Liu and Wei Ping View PDF HTML (experimental) Abstract: We present Audio-Visual Flamingo (AV-Flamingo), a fully open state-of-the-art audio-visual large language model (AV-LLM) for joint understanding and reasoning over audio, images, and long-form videos. Unlike prior AV-LLMs that primarily focus on short clips, AV-Flamingo is designed for understanding and reasoning over long and complex real-world (audio-visual) videos. To support this, we make three key contributions: (i) Audio-Visual-Skills, a large-scale collection of real-world videos with ~7M caption and question-answer training instances designed to emphasize temporal, compositional, and cross-modal audio-visual reasoning; (ii) a novel three-stage curriculum that progressively trains the model from short-range perception to long-horizon multi-event reasoning; and (iii) Temporal Audio-Visual Interleaved Chain-of-Thought, a reasoning framework that explicitly grounds intermediate reasoning steps to timestamps in long audio-visual streams, improving temporal alignment and interpretability. Extensive experiments across 15+ audio-visual, omni-modal, audio, and vision benchmarks show that AV-Flamingo outperforms similarly sized open models by clear margins and remains highly competitive with, and in some cases surpasses, much larger open-weight and closed models, particularly on long and complex real-world audio-visual understanding and reasoning tasks. Beyond benchmark performance, AV-Flamingo exhibits strong real-world utility and transfers well to unseen tasks, highlighting its robustness and generalization ability. news.title: 美团LongCat推出LoHoSearch：新一代搜索智能体基准
news.summary: 美团LongCat发布了LoHoSearch，这是一个基于762万实体维基百科知识图谱自动生成问题的搜索智能体基准，旨在解决现有基准的饱和问题。该基准包含544道问题，覆盖11个领域，采用树与图结构，已开源。测试结果显示，前沿模型的最佳得分仅为34.74%，远低于当前模型在BrowseComp上的约90%成绩。
keyPoints: LoHoSearch基于762万实体的维基百科知识图谱自动生成问题，提升了搜索的复杂性和多样性。
该基准包含544道问题，覆盖11个领域，采用树与图结构，已开源供研究者使用。
在11个前沿模型的测试中，最佳得分为34.74%，显示出当前模型在新基准下的挑战性。
上下文策略的提升幅度仅为6.8个百分点，远低于在BrowseComp基准中的14个百分点。
LoHoSearch的推出旨在解决现有搜索智能体基准的饱和问题，推动搜索技术的发展。
news.background: 随着搜索智能体技术的快速发展，现有的基准测试如BrowseComp已经趋于饱和，无法有效评估新模型的能力。美团LongCat推出的LoHoSearch基准，利用维基百科的知识图谱自动生成问题，旨在提供更具挑战性的测试环境。该基准的设计考虑了搜索空间和结构复杂性，超越了人工标注的限制，为研究者提供了新的测试工具。
news.impact: LoHoSearch的发布将对搜索智能体的开发和评估产生深远影响。研究人员和开发者可以利用这一新基准测试其模型的能力，推动搜索技术的创新。随着更多模型在这一基准下进行测试，可能会促使行业内的技术进步，提升用户体验和搜索结果的准确性。
useCases: 使用LoHoSearch基准测试新开发的搜索智能体，评估其在复杂问题上的表现。
利用开源的LoHoSearch数据集进行模型训练，提升搜索智能体的准确性和效率。
对比不同模型在LoHoSearch基准下的表现，分析其优缺点，优化算法设计。
在学术研究中引用LoHoSearch基准，推动搜索智能体领域的理论发展。
参与LoHoSearch的社区讨论，分享测试结果和优化经验，促进技术交流。
risks: 使用LoHoSearch基准时，需注意API调用的配额限制，避免超出使用限制导致测试中断。
确保所使用的模型与LoHoSearch基准的版本兼容，避免因版本不匹配导致测试结果不准确。
在使用开源数据集时，需遵循相关的商用授权协议，确保合法使用数据。
由于基准问题的复杂性，可能需要额外的计算资源，确保硬件配置能够满足测试需求。
在分析测试结果时，需考虑上下文策略的影响，避免误解模型性能。
news.reason: LoHoSearch基准的推出为搜索智能体的评估提供了新的视角，具有重要的研究和应用价值，值得关注。
news.originalContent: Post Log in Sign up Post Meituan LongCat @Meituan_LongCat BrowseComp went from 30% → 90% in 10 months. Search-agent benchmarks are saturating. So we built LoHoSearch: a harder benchmark for search agents, with questions automatically generated from a 7.62M-entity Wikipedia knowledge graph instead of written by humans. It maximizes search space and structural complexity beyond what human annotators can reliably design. Results on 11 frontier models: → Best: 34.74%, and the next 3 models cluster around 15–16% — vs. top models now score ~90% on BrowseComp → Best context strategy gains only +6.8 pp here — vs. +14 pp on BrowseComp 544 questions. 11 domains. Tree + graph structures. news.title: 识别 AI 写作套话的 LLM cliché highlighter 工具
news.summary: 我最近看到 Simon Willison 开发的 LLM cliché highlighter，这款工具可以帮助我们识别和高亮 LLM 生成文本中的常见套话，比如 "no fluff, no filler, no jargon" 等。它的设计初衷是让读者能快速过滤掉那些充斥在文章中的 AI 写作风格化表达，提升阅读体验。
keyPoints: LLM cliché highlighter 是由 Simon Willison 使用 Fable 5 开发的，专注于检测和高亮 LLM 输出中的常见套话。
该工具能够识别十种常见的套话模式，用户只需将文本粘贴到分析器中即可。
支持可切换的模式检测和上下文感知的句子高亮，帮助用户更好地理解文本结构。
工具的设计灵感源于作者对 LLM 生成文本中陈词滥调的厌倦，旨在提升文章的可读性。
该工具于 2026 年 7 月 17 日发布，适用于需要处理大量文本的专业人士。
news.background: 在 AI 文本生成日益普及的今天，许多文章中充斥着 LLM 生成的陈词滥调，影响了阅读体验。Simon Willison 开发的 LLM cliché highlighter 正是为了应对这一问题。通过高亮常见的套话，用户可以更轻松地识别和过滤掉这些冗余表达，从而专注于内容的核心价值。此工具的推出，标志着对 AI 写作风格化表达的反思与改进，尤其在信息过载的时代显得尤为重要。
news.impact: 这款工具将对内容创作者、编辑和研究人员产生积极影响。内容创作者可以利用它提升文章质量，减少冗余表达；编辑则能更高效地审阅稿件，确保内容的独特性和可读性。此外，研究人员在分析 AI 生成文本时，也能借助此工具快速识别常见模式，优化研究结果。
useCases: 使用 LLM cliché highlighter 分析自己的文章，识别并去除多余的套话，提高文章质量。
编辑在审阅稿件时，利用该工具快速定位陈词滥调，确保内容的独特性。
研究人员在分析 AI 生成文本时，借助工具识别常见模式，优化研究结果。
市场营销人员使用该工具检查广告文案，确保信息传达的清晰和有效。
技术写作专家利用高亮功能，提升技术文档的可读性，减少读者的理解负担。
risks: 可能会出现误判，某些非套话的表达也被高亮，影响用户的判断。
工具依赖于文本的上下文，若上下文不清晰，可能导致高亮结果不准确。
在处理多语言文本时，可能无法有效识别所有语言中的套话。
用户可能过于依赖工具，忽视了自身的写作能力和风格。
API 价格和使用配额可能会影响工具的长期使用，需关注相关政策。
news.reason: 这款工具能有效提升文本质量，帮助用户快速识别和过滤掉冗余表达，值得一试。
news.originalContent: Tool: LLM cliché highlighter Simon Willison’s Weblog Subscribe Sponsored by: Atlassian — Give your agents a plan. Not a prompt. New Jira capabilities unlock full-context for AI-native software development. Assign tasks to Claude, Cursor, or GitHub Copilot, now directly from Jira. Learn more 17th July 2026 Tool LLM cliché highlighter — Detect and highlight common clichéd phrases in text that frequently appear in language model outputs. Paste text into the analyzer to identify patterns like "no X, no Y" chains, "sit with that," "you already know," and other LLM-generated expressions, with toggleable pattern detection and context-aware sentence highlighting. I got frustrated reading yet another article that was crammed with the clichés of LLM-generated writing - "no fluff, no filler, no jargon" type stuff - so I had Fable 5 vibe code up this app for highlighting ten common patterns that show up in that sort of writing.
